name: John Fetterman
subject: re: optimism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
By now, you may have heard the news: Today was my 52nd birthday.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210815-2296-header&t=1&akid=2296%2E434096%2EX1atCK)
Peter,
I know I don't usually write to you this late on a Sunday, but I wanted to send you a quick personal note before tonight's mid-month deadline and ask if you'll [** _chip in any amount that makes sense for you to support our campaign for Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27814?refcode=em20210815-2296&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2296%2E434096%2EX1atCK)
By now, you may have heard the news: **Today was my 52nd birthday. I'm lucky enough to share a birthday with my daughter Grace, who turned 10 today.**
Grace had a great birthday and mint chocolate chip ice cream cake, her favorite. Meanwhile, Gisele got me this heartfelt billboard on Route 30 right by our house. 🙄
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27814?refcode=em20210815-2296&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2296%2E434096%2EX1atCK)
I'll admit I've never been that big on gifts. But I'll go ahead and share an earnest birthday wish:
As a parent, my #1 hope is that our kids get to inherit a world in which they can be happy, healthy, and safe. Where the value of honest work is rewarded fairly, and where every person has a decent shot at success for themselves and their families.
Call me an optimist, but I don't think that's too much to ask.
I *seriously* believe that leaving this country better than my generation found it is possible — and that belief is what got me into public service to begin with. And it's why, alongside my incredible family, I decided to go for it and join this race for Senate.
Increasingly, politics is often ugly. These past few years have been no exception. But being a dad, on the other hand, reminds you why it matters so much to get it right.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27814?refcode=em20210815-2296&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2296%2E434096%2EX1atCK)
There's *so* much at stake. From making sure families can afford to keep a roof over their heads and their kids fed, to tackling the climate crisis, to finally curbing the epidemic of gun violence on our streets and in our schools.
Right now, Democrats have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to make incredible progress on all of this and more. We just need to lead with enough courage to make it happen.
**So here's my promise to you, Peter: If elected to the Senate, I'll fight as hard for you and your family as I do for my own.** And when it comes time to vote on the most important issues facing our country, I'll always cast my vote in the Senate with our kids and our future generations in mind.
With that, I'll let you get back to your Sunday evening. But I'd be remiss if I wrote to you a few hours before a fundraising deadline and didn't ask: [** _Will you send a few bucks our way before midnight to help make sure we can take this fight all the way to the floor of the U.S. Senate? I'd be so incredibly grateful — and hey, it is this old guy's birthday after all._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27814?refcode=em20210815-2296&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2296%2E434096%2EX1atCK) 😉 ____
Thank you so much for being a part of this.
— John

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210815-2296-footer&t=6&refcode2=2296_434096_X1atCK&akid=2296%2E434096%2EX1atCK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=2296%2E434096%2EX1atCK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2296%2E434096%2EX1atCK)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Sarah (iPhone)
subject: thank you, thank you, thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Peter,

As I am sitting here about to go to bed, I just wanted to send a quick note to everyone saying thank you for the birthday calls, texts, and cards over the last few days. I was blown away to find out there were almost 20,000 signatures from friends and supporters on the birthday card my family put together. Your support and kind words mean the world to me, and they certainly made this birthday extra special!

My family and I would not be on this journey without you, so please know how thankful I am for your support.

Off to get a couple of hours of sleep before the start of another busy week on the campaign trail.

Thank you,
Sarah Huckabee Sanders

Sent from my iPhone |
---

Donald J. Trump August 14th, 2021
Joe Biden gets it wrong every time on foreign policy, and many other issues. Everyone knew he couldn't handle the pressure. Even Obama's Secretary of Defense, Robert Gates, said as much. He ran out of Afghanistan instead of following the plan our Administration left for him--a plan that protected our people and our property, and ensured the Taliban would never dream of taking our Embassy or providing a base for new attacks against America. The withdrawal would be guided by facts on the ground.

After I took out ISIS, I established a credible deterrent. That deterrent is now gone. The Taliban no longer has fear or respect for America, or America's power. What a disgrace it will be when the Taliban raises their flag over America's Embassy in Kabul. This is complete failure through weakness, incompetence, and total strategic incoherence.

name: Chief James Craig
subject: disgusting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136738:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r) | |
---
Peter,

**What is the Left 's response to our concerns about rising crime in the wake of the Defund the Police movement?**

__**Tell us to "suck it up."**__

I'm not exaggerating. That is a DIRECT quote from Rep. Cori Bush, one of the most outspoken advocates of defunding the police.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136738:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)

It's shameful. It's just another example of the "rules for thee and not for me" politicians across this country.

**My name is Chief James Craig, and I am the former Detroit Chief of Police. Not only do I reject the call to "Defund the Police," I believe we have a public safety crisis in America - and it's time we gave the police even MORE support.**

We all deserve to feel safe in our communities - not just those who can afford their own private security.

Peter, it's past time that our leaders started taking our public safety crisis seriously. I believe it's time to act.

And it's part of why the Michigan governor's race is attracting national attention: because I'm a veteran police chief who is unafraid to stand up to the elites when it comes to our police.

I couldn't be more touched by what Tucker had to say about my time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020:

_" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters." _

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136738:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136738:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**That 's why I opened an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of that team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136738:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)**
[**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136738:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

**And I've already told you MY position on "Defund the Police!"**

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136738:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136739:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136740:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136741:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136742:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136738:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

_P.S. I 'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-171745](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58136738:6wxEB5lXN:m:1:3253819041:18A2963C431D8585ABEE616B11CFB6DD:r)**_

name: Burt Jones for Georgia
subject: BURT JONES CAMPAIGN RELEASES STATEWIDE TV AD "SCREAM"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, AUGUST 16, 2021
BURT JONES CAMPAIGN RELEASES STATEWIDE TV AD ENTITLED "SCREAM"
JACKSON - Today, conservative candidate for Georgia Lieutenant Governor Burt Jones released his first campaign ad, entitled "Scream," highlighting his commitment to strengthening election integrity and exposing voter fraud despite unhinged objections from Democrats in Georgia. Unlike some johnny-come-lately Republicans, Burt is the only candidate in the race for Lieutenant Governor who has consistently fought for more electoral transparency and accountability. Last month, as a member of the Senate Government Oversight Committee, he called for an [investigation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l5wHHrGnnzVZQnsfWKKdeKJUbfjJAJT9BgoW-xclsL4lfIAChcXfP9bV114SQtIy1y6OxChA6ZlvmIqYH-sjRw-iLlqMV0ISurf7dJukvtXYsjpRE20Er1r02oD0eu5I7LH_-6xB18CL3tn96BmsEg5KBhj15hJL8zDRU79Ip60iBcVnPf_t4q70gAjMWCIZZyvNTvYcQYKzD1F02zeVWAnIvg2mE0EA7JqrK05d0hf-MiWjolGNDg==&c=xeRs2OkavFpRj-UvxbB93buo-nXr2lfMF5T_ymNijFCPvY44ja4Iyg==&ch=NV2ep5c7Mx3DP6xW_cLPRWKZMdCwp1aqO8omIrGXbVgvYD6X5d6rMQ==) into Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger, and in November of 2020, he was one of only four state senators to [call for a special session](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l5wHHrGnnzVZQnsfWKKdeKJUbfjJAJT9BgoW-xclsL4lfIAChcXfP9bV114SQtIyYMf5V-R2iHng6Bd2QZQ_Z4wOln51qpXfphtMj3jXs8FdE9kC0hGe1oozR1mm9KqRq-FF-aboOqKSJE6F4EAGkLsxr65Q6cKhb7KEJjC9Msi7VeFO2nRn7-Ek3sbKyKzu38m-bWbwJI9lLGclwA34GFiKRTGjdY0jPdvi6-olKnWPnHg9DquNLI_IYfUMK6V7iEQiY5SLl8hmLH65G68AZw==&c=xeRs2OkavFpRj-UvxbB93buo-nXr2lfMF5T_ymNijFCPvY44ja4Iyg==&ch=NV2ep5c7Mx3DP6xW_cLPRWKZMdCwp1aqO8omIrGXbVgvYD6X5d6rMQ==) to investigate the 2020 election.
The ad is part of a six-figure statewide campaign and will run on both broadcast and digital outlets.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l5wHHrGnnzVZQnsfWKKdeKJUbfjJAJT9BgoW-xclsL4lfIAChcXfP9bV114SQtIy26u_dcFPSf9TypU-Idc1xge0g0aE6xm1SiSUeoeC11Kb2HXENMyipkmYF1KNDZdnyd6OMEf1pQP_GNZZyL2hehTgEc8isAwyYJRYZe643HPOlD944lOXOQ==&c=xeRs2OkavFpRj-UvxbB93buo-nXr2lfMF5T_ymNijFCPvY44ja4Iyg==&ch=NV2ep5c7Mx3DP6xW_cLPRWKZMdCwp1aqO8omIrGXbVgvYD6X5d6rMQ==) or the image below to view the ad:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l5wHHrGnnzVZQnsfWKKdeKJUbfjJAJT9BgoW-xclsL4lfIAChcXfP9bV114SQtIy26u_dcFPSf9TypU-Idc1xge0g0aE6xm1SiSUeoeC11Kb2HXENMyipkmYF1KNDZdnyd6OMEf1pQP_GNZZyL2hehTgEc8isAwyYJRYZe643HPOlD944lOXOQ==&c=xeRs2OkavFpRj-UvxbB93buo-nXr2lfMF5T_ymNijFCPvY44ja4Iyg==&ch=NV2ep5c7Mx3DP6xW_cLPRWKZMdCwp1aqO8omIrGXbVgvYD6X5d6rMQ==)
---
| View a transcript of the ad below:
I'm Burt Jones. Let me ask you a simple question:
If there wasn't any cheating or fraud in the 2020 election, why every time we call for a full investigation, Stacey Abrams and the Democrats respond like this:
[SCREAMING]
Pretty much tells you everything you need to know.
I'm going to make sure we investigate and expose all voter fraud because that's what real leadership does.
---
| ###

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Lt. Col. Wendy Rogers
subject: Announcing the Election Integrity Caucus
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE
body:
Warriors for the truth |
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58138574:J3kPF5lNc:m:1:3253819041:276F1873C4AB2A8EDD598E79575552B7:r)
---
| Peter,

I have an announcement!

At the Election Integrity Symposium put on by Mike Lindell in South Dakota, I had the honor of meeting patriots from around the country- many in state legislatures, like me.

And after this fantastic week, I have this to announce: there are many of us, in all 50 states, who are passionate about election integrity and committed to secure elections.

I'm Arizona State Senator Wendy Rogers. I am an Arizona State Senator, fighting for election integrity in Arizona and beyond! [Please help me continue to fight for America's Audit!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58138574:J3kPF5lNc:m:1:3253819041:276F1873C4AB2A8EDD598E79575552B7:r)

**Those of us fighting for election integrity in America's statehouses have joined forces!**

_An Election Integrity Caucus consisting of lawmakers from all 50 states has officially been formed.

Arizona Senator Wendy Rogers, who is one of the caucus founders, made the special announcement while attending Mike Lindell's Cyber Symposium with other members of the newly formed caucus.

"I am one of the founding members of the Election Integrity Caucus that consists of legislators from all 50 states. Reminds me of the Continental Congress," Sen. Rogers tweeted. "We will meet regularly and we will talk regularly to implement the securing our elections."_
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58138574:J3kPF5lNc:m:1:3253819041:276F1873C4AB2A8EDD598E79575552B7:r)
---
| Of course, you know that I want Arizona's broken elections fixed. I was the sham of 2020 corrected.

But this goes beyond AZ.

I want every county, every state to audit. Let's clean up the whole thing.

To heck with Biden and Merrick Garland. They were beneficiaries of the steal; they are compromised. We need to fight them!
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58138574:J3kPF5lNc:m:1:3253819041:276F1873C4AB2A8EDD598E79575552B7:r)
---
| **I didn't go to South Dakota just to see the sights. I went because I am a part of a nationwide movement that is reforming our elections to remove the endemic corruption and fraud.**

But there's so much more to do. The America Last forces- those that rig the elections to their own benefit- are fighting hard. And they have the power of the Federal Government, which means we must fight back harder. [Will you help me get to the truth about this election?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58138574:J3kPF5lNc:m:1:3253819041:276F1873C4AB2A8EDD598E79575552B7:r)

Whether it's Milwaukee, or Atlanta, or Philadelphia, or Maricopa County... we can uncover this fraud. We can clean it up.

The Left loves fraud. They cheat like they breathe. [Help us finish this process!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58138574:J3kPF5lNc:m:1:3253819041:276F1873C4AB2A8EDD598E79575552B7:r)

This is a hard fight. The media will villify us, but we are right. [Join our fight and help us stop the fraud!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58138574:J3kPF5lNc:m:1:3253819041:276F1873C4AB2A8EDD598E79575552B7:r)

Thank you so much.

America First,
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58138574:J3kPF5lNc:m:1:3253819041:276F1873C4AB2A8EDD598E79575552B7:r)
---
| Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret)
Arizona State Senator
Arizona's 6th Legislative District
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58138574:J3kPF5lNc:m:1:3253819041:276F1873C4AB2A8EDD598E79575552B7:r)
---
|

PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE

name: Drew Thompson
subject: Timken Back the Blue Events - Come Aug 28th & show your support!
body:
Peter,

We are less than two weeks away from our *Timken Backs the Blue *events with
former New York City Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik, who guided the
police response during the 9/11 attacks on the World Trade Center.

It is critical during this time of constant attacks on our police officers
that we show we have their backs and are grateful for their daily
sacrifice. Join us at one of the two events below, bring a police officer
that we can thank, and share the events on your social media!

*Timken Backs the Blue BBQ with NYC Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik*

Date: August 28th

Time: 11:30AM

Location: Timken HQ. 921 Chatham Ln Columbus, OH 43221

Sign up: here
<https://janetimkenforohio-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com/Redirect?ukey=17Y7Mc4raXaraHB19uF_vNq0F6gTGLNYf0oWax57NFJE-535206040&key=YAMMID-33740655&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fforms%2Fd%2Fe%2F1FAIpQLSd5DVZ4Bh9tIL6s9oF3i-d8DRTwAPSzgjGsaeZk1RkLE6-Rkw%2Fviewform>

*Eventbrite: Columbus
<https://janetimkenforohio-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com/Redirect?ukey=17Y7Mc4raXaraHB19uF_vNq0F6gTGLNYf0oWax57NFJE-535206040&key=YAMMID-33740655&link=https%3A%2F%2Fjanetimkenforohio-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com%2FRedirect%3Fukey%3D1UO-zVimMzbeI7PkWGfMOOpRpFdFiVGXm4CMuReP-K2A-1402077545%26key%3DYAMMID-28279269%26link%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fjanetimkenforohio-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com%252FRedirect%253Fukey%253D1UO-zVimMzbeI7PkWGfMOOpRpFdFiVGXm4CMuReP-K2A-779909847%2526key%253DYAMMID-05481361%2526link%253Dhttps%25253A%25252F%25252Fwww.eventbrite.com%25252Fe%25252Ftimken-backs-the-blue-bbq-tickets-166533182231>*

*JTFO Intern & Volunteer Rally with NYC Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik*

Date: August 28th

Time: 4:30PM

Location: Mahoning County GOP HQ. 8381 Market St, Boardman, OH 44512

Sign up: here
<https://janetimkenforohio-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com/Redirect?ukey=17Y7Mc4raXaraHB19uF_vNq0F6gTGLNYf0oWax57NFJE-535206040&key=YAMMID-33740655&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fforms%2Fd%2Fe%2F1FAIpQLSd5DVZ4Bh9tIL6s9oF3i-d8DRTwAPSzgjGsaeZk1RkLE6-Rkw%2Fviewform>

*Eventbrite: Youngstown
<https://janetimkenforohio-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com/Redirect?ukey=17Y7Mc4raXaraHB19uF_vNq0F6gTGLNYf0oWax57NFJE-535206040&key=YAMMID-33740655&link=https%3A%2F%2Fjanetimkenforohio-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com%2FRedirect%3Fukey%3D1UO-zVimMzbeI7PkWGfMOOpRpFdFiVGXm4CMuReP-K2A-1402077545%26key%3DYAMMID-28279269%26link%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fjanetimkenforohio-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com%252FRedirect%253Fukey%253D1UO-zVimMzbeI7PkWGfMOOpRpFdFiVGXm4CMuReP-K2A-779909847%2526key%253DYAMMID-05481361%2526link%253Dhttps%25253A%25252F%25252Fwww.eventbrite.com%25252Fe%25252Ftimken-backs-the-blue-rally-tickets-166541346651>*

See you there!

-Jane Timken for Ohio

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I know my Oma's story is not unique
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Eighty-six years ago, Social Security was signed into law. Many folks take this critical legislation for granted now, but it was a radical concept at the time: if you pay your fair share, you can count on your government to have your back when you need it.

Roughly 65 million people rely on Social Security. It's not just seniors and those in retirement who count on Social Security: people with disabilities, children, and survivors of deceased workers are among the other groups of Americans who count on this government program.

Social Security is one of the things our government does best, and it has the high approval ratings to prove it. But maddeningly, there are those in power who continue to attack Social Security and try to cut funding for this critical service.

I have always fought to protect Social Security and worked hard to defend it against senseless cuts. It's one of the reasons why I was endorsed by the National Committee to Preserve Social Security and Medicare.

**[But I need your help to make clear the importance of Social Security to those who just don't get it. Will you sign my petition to show your support for Social Security?](https://act.myngp.com/el/XBh4Vaw5MisWR3fqch7yPS2j8s4GE_r5nlni0FM09aU=/lvdNVZPd62eSGrHXIonC29WNyoWViS8wUWLRINVjiWM=?gpsid=50_115_20155&ms=em21_210814_SocSec_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx_v1&refcode=em21_210814_SocSec_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx_v1&utm_campaign=em21_210814_SocSec_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx_v1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

I watched firsthand the benefit Social Security gave to my Oma. She lived to be almost 109 years old, and Social Security is a huge reason why she was able to live with dignity well into her second century.

My Oma's story is not unique. Those of you reading this email probably have your own example of why Social Security is important to you, and I hope I can count on your help to defend this critical program.

**[Add your name today to show your support for protecting Social Security. Celebrate 86 years of this program by helping ensure we have it for the next 86 years- and beyond!](https://act.myngp.com/el/XBh4Vaw5MisWR3fqch7yPS2j8s4GE_r5nlni0FM09aU=/lvdNVZPd62eSGrHXIonC29WNyoWViS8wUWLRINVjiWM=?gpsid=50_115_20155&ms=em21_210814_SocSec_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx_v1&refcode=em21_210814_SocSec_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx_v1&utm_campaign=em21_210814_SocSec_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx_v1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you. As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FkhbUbDrg6PA7k6MrkXkwdsdjY7XTJ-EJphZZ12SL_4vvJ_HIkbX2j-9HS8JHMMhb-ke-98suw8qeZaEVrOzhcap8gMDWx3G1dAJiiuBOrX_iFDIKJSdsJ2uzrmSwc9_fK4puJs-V0Llal5Zp6ZsSpIbfTqCBSb93w6hIE43z51YETsMffqqscGeR43KZhElqQhUcHZ6nFi6Kpj_tlWA8GqgOHKIE5PbfPi15C8Hh1yt77PjYMbgmkRdMhHhKq29jA_pLJdsoGF7W5n1oKFyAXde4llV7MPweDpdC56Uuu1k0v_7Ho_L5s671kr0irZ9k5yMibfPuLOZy2iN-gxvHLy0vGR7K2x-mKSei1Zd5ha1sdvZEgGHphNIXs6czs7f-g/3ei/KUfjWm9mTOasaDh2sMsY5w/h0/0261248BDsgNdpnUn6igp3PgKV1PcaLRASHLDVLKvAk)
Derek —

I have an important ask to make, and Common Good VA said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.

**One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, recently dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.**

We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal.

That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back.

**And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:**

**[If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good VA? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FnvPpDgH-uyRDwwzElAp1U5exzw5FXKaSI5rgjfS4WjC4gAHqiEJAgEKtqlJLW9eUtlrMHQq-dh0P6x3OXXSf_Mqebvq2OCVfuiGjzCyyfHSgeedYagLbqYipY_qixsPKfyNP7xVyLFi-vl1R0boS_BpFw2zKUHUiGkAtoLrytoimm9ZCHLfLrhMLI1htEO1z_66fgawZiBYcJfask5AqA13YZsLZaRnYwUHo_Q89phG9XfVigRq97-uqY3ZLAe0L2XJATbA9SPyfv1BFhb95uCZWv2ZMLS8O1yyg8K5Dhrxv50t2DPYYU1-xT8EN_FvlJjNTvfzxG3_QPO9spSXgrM50azxHBZskY0KNgar2iuYIteXBRaScIJ1dZRkjumBuA/3ei/KUfjWm9mTOasaDh2sMsY5w/h1/ERWn3tBgyXjInjAL4my2BImTpDSJzJZ1pPjg9Msxt4U)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FnvPpDgH-uyRDwwzElAp1U5exzw5FXKaSI5rgjfS4WjCMAxQ1iuDV3R-OVWC3lirbbOBbG3QbzVS0zqMHVWGkgsPz_Ugw1pOXuqRl1oaBuJMKHwlhGaIcxawO2D6L5yqhI407vC31J3rVE5LNGYsp1yWMkgM0cDXB2h7CucXsr0dQRiIC2EXUFeIaT4UP7DClANICYcTpJtjfXx0n_K4aKu0vrV4Rpyqs7MQyfNyCWwz3QottDlooOK2Bb3HtT2SvBKHCDBiPia_TK-LgJytQNmLyXgCeTYB6pDcq617iWQ1tW3X884sl7f7QuqEFlxu594iOGhQnu8fG9MYpMlkv_TSsR1FMWl2sFnEYSgMc05fzZ4vnNbmWOZyO2dRYxmdjQ/3ei/KUfjWm9mTOasaDh2sMsY5w/h2/Isy3aUuvOhit4jLjNEjph8xav_2tS0BVntzRYFCIySg)

[ Donate $100 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FnvPpDgH-uyRDwwzElAp1U6ylnLOF_pJbfCC_71lIcrH_oHVMlWy_2TbcH4b9xa_mWF9qLF5dYIhDCQjfqXWSVsn-KzNXSbMZ9tKyiiC7BtKl4xlXJwpHegPxTjJmw02ACmsZgs23a43S1SSnjZaNkmMeDwe-ipYtcav-ps5u1mBPOn2HgXpz2pVKxzOBNIOdvqmW4LBZOhPvSzOPQwsZcTzPvb51NR1LLehSjNzcgyR8ixbHoDSPLb43iEH-K6cqE1PgTEo4OQS1SJk_FTHKiNCcYaac1brNo4JaJnPpvOyiYNwbGSG-VCJdy9ZqHoWpPbAim8OSeTnqVBpd7CBCrCsBUDOlzQWHmuocqiHhlJZDEKUAN4G9Y_hbtPI0sQdJQ/3ei/KUfjWm9mTOasaDh2sMsY5w/h4/8WdCVXRnF7w2DFGh4ztRH42CjmJiZMy7PfsSZ6QK6Cs)
[ Donate other ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FkhbUbDrg6PA7k6MrkXkwdu6Ba507O7lAW-LL4e4eqcMuNAsosxpYFFxJx-pP-gCYnKJ3NxgxwcoSiv1doblRZaq_F8hR7t0g0iaELALRPK8ywe70co_6eVrIzdopYP9zXKWvwZOQlV4ULcBWeV18dzlVGjJN_oIwDLoaiC6YvW1Ljzti5TzLZDdFD6YOkJ19-LCYD1oBgFbYbff_5SC5Yh1K26yQZSGsvW1NW-S3eRdhSOj7bkCpyLcOAKfVHBg_LNnzCfrBGbQq0xGhH-gnk8qXVvD8D51Ejj9A1uveSFERDEpzj2wvFFyC1zuoiLJfpk0Ro83tX9_mLORSBSTNDocCCSPgHtQVl5GhFjdeYUkDRFv3zm8NbBbqAC8JOPFZQ/3ei/KUfjWm9mTOasaDh2sMsY5w/h5/JtYug_tJf6woeNLybop7InpClQH3ARBHYkspRfH42S4) ** As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond.

Thank you for all that you do,

— Mark

subject: Peter, have you seen my latest ad?
body:
Thanks to the patriots supporting our campaign, I’ve launched my second television ad, Faith and Football.
---

| Peter,
I've officially launched my second television ad, Faith and Football.
In my ad, I discuss how my faith and my experience on the football field helped mold me into the successful businessman I am today.
Our message is reaching voters on televisions and radios, but I need your help, Peter, to reach more voters online.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Enn9-dpNCZfTFKzKJ41GrMHjENUuJkTIhuysXYAGy3FVx1DYxoBv8tA8x14HdLBmHWWw2SKew4BWe4YrDtMl1dxi65lle-JJsbHipOvy6997440XQfQzFkx2yxVOZB0sDu8z2i9rTK94M26Y3WlDMHhfeOq9pnSKugc1FPnj8pSHqe2h5vznwyAla8QYXkgpLkSgTFrxnBc=&c=iNEytoIbn29g8QA8wYQblst5gVn3w1gNXdqtWad0zXLwEHhAzBE6eQ==&ch=NNVtfLY81RkkJoUzII_A6ObAdwS0k1yIaFFwUKne4vnmb48DF77Trw==)

body:

**Drain The Swamp**
Remember when Joe Biden canceled the Keystone XL pipeline?

Well, 7 months later, he realizes what a terrible idea that was.
[**Protect American Energy >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ba82ebed9c1044529625f5a5abffb848&_e=CPw0eZnsMMwgpkuPCGdOSQ3CJS9KTqbFKuo59C8vogLBB2JvnrjtfLMQSjegERxKRucn2loXWKv1pw_XIN77LGbKx0eOdDQPU5csuaXZ3ec4xk6v8UqEZvlnCBTVVS7QNLyRq2innOG58GXYwMmO1YSLscIoA1C_ej6fSto1z79aRo2kPXBYBsVbOeyVfywihfpUVCxizxVoc0xY_ctl92ae9sG2ab-rcib15ns7EHtGSx-x2EeeNogTP4LfyrTMBsKXf9n7bjine9KvyWeVTYxM9xngG-uxP1n6sWKprfJbuMX1NEZOeG9X41onqi44)
The Keystone XL pipeline would have provided thousands of American jobs, boosted our economy, and most importantly, boosted our energy supply, making America less dependent on hostile countries.

But President Biden pandered to the radical environmentalists on the Left, and now we’re all paying the price.

We are LITERALLY paying the price at the pump.

With gas prices shooting up, Biden called on OPEC to produce more oil, claiming high gasoline prices “risk harming the ongoing global recovery.”

**You think?!**

Gas prices in the U.S. rose almost **42%** in July compared with the same month last year.

**If this isn’t the height of liberal lunacy, I don't know what is. **

[It’s reckless policies like this that remind us how badly we need to drain the swamp. America needs leaders who will put the American people first – not liberal activists. ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ba82ebed9c1044529625f5a5abffb848&_e=CPw0eZnsMMwgpkuPCGdOSQ3CJS9KTqbFKuo59C8vogLBB2JvnrjtfLMQSjegERxKRucn2loXWKv1pw_XIN77LG_9evgA6xdT454UXm_GJcN4anVjU_P5s6twcxOnijTJmOhW5o5Z7zAbqKtUHNN_OP962ECz8qkHot3E5LJZhU__ql1Vf7h-dl9pOjVFI91I7ht3c4BIKRyB0-5i4LtsVDkKO2Jvwnt2Jb0-0hakyVtWP6YIFpEEH95mkrVK-rDAKOqgc46EJXzi4Gz5YoLCEdeP9Kr2Ihs5HKs-LwFdmFoq_V3I0HlyeDYiRvAJ3JSR)
[**Help Drain the Swamp >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ba82ebed9c1044529625f5a5abffb848&_e=CPw0eZnsMMwgpkuPCGdOSQ3CJS9KTqbFKuo59C8vogLBB2JvnrjtfLMQSjegERxKRucn2loXWKv1pw_XIN77LKyQ32GnI-PjkIFnLFUaBAS7QuF_9QfOzPXlpbpXoBViym8JWTK1SkrgHTrH-pMF5Uzr5FHk0NmFg9NjarwJuOb742EIflTUFKs_1dZrqS4ZcEIUGs42Qff9OmIcHLnA4ktZzGfNmT1BRy-NtQryJAmeARL9sklKC0bpOfYZrAJfNdu20NX1yFFTUVpb1Y-Oh3VrBkCiB6ARCb-uPmmTmNUa3uJcxLicl-j_F5HzhpdK)

clean_body: | | | Drain The Swamp Remember when Joe Biden canceled the Keystone XL pipeline? Well, 7 months later, he realizes what a terrible idea that was. The Keystone XL pipeline would have provided thousands of American jobs, boosted our economy, and most importantly, boosted our energy supply, making America less dependent on hostile countries. But President Biden pandered to the radical environmentalists on the Left, and now we’re all paying the price. We are LITERALLY paying the price at the pump. With gas prices shooting up, Biden called on OPEC to produce more oil, claiming high gasoline prices “risk harming the ongoing global recovery.” You think?! Gas prices in the U.S. rose almost 42% in July compared with the same month last year. If this isn’t the height of liberal lunacy, I don't know what is. We wanted to do something significant to spread this message. That’s why we’re giving away a free “Drain the Swamp” hat to everyone who donates $35 or more in the next 24 hours. Tim Burchett | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Cristina =?iso-8859-1?q?Tzintz=FAn_Ram=EDrez?=
subject: Sneak peek at our big plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; https://nextgenamerica
body:
Hi friend,

I hope you’re having a great summer. These last few months have been a whirlwind! I wanted to be sure to send you an update now that I’ve gotten settled into my new role as President. We’ve been traveling across the country to connect with NextGen supporters and political leaders — and we’re gearing up now for 2022.

As you know, last year’s youth voter turnout was the highest in our country’s history. This year, I’m so excited to capitalize on that momentum by building the nation’s largest youth voter mobilization effort for the coming election. With the Senate, House, and statehouses up for grabs, we’re doing the hard work now to reach 9.2 million young people in eight states, ensuring they show up in 2022. We know that organizing and reaching young voters now will make a difference in whether they vote in the next election.

How we're doing it:

-Talking to young voters, especially those who rarely or never voted before 2020, so they know the impact of their vote. Last month alone, we connected with 1 million young voters to make sure they knew how and where to get their free vaccine and the role the federal government had played in reopening our economy and schools. We also reached a quarter-million young voters to turn them out in local elections in Pennsylvania.

-Building on-the-ground voter engagement and registration programs in Texas, Pennsylvania, Arizona, and North Carolina. Our efforts will result in hundreds of thousands of new young people registered to vote with an expected turnout rate of 73 percent.

What’s next: We are continuing to build our expertise and lead the field nationally in reaching the largest and most progressive voting bloc in the country. I would love for you to join us as we continue fighting for our nation’s youth to be represented. You can sign up to volunteer with us [https://nextgenamerica.org/volunteer/] or you can donate to support our work [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nga-aug-em?refcode=em_c_210815newsletter_n_ctr_90do_5_ng_n_pt] . We cannot wait to get started on all this work. Get ready for more updates from me because it’s going to be a busy year.

Lastly, I’ll leave you with some of my favorite clips we’ve earned over the last few weeks:

Biden’s First 100 Days Through the Eyes of American Youth [https://harvardpolitics.com/biden-2021-youth-poll/] - Harvard Political Review

The Cross Connection with Tiffany Cross [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Q5PcyIIv_8VU2p5SPNBIQEavW6uJG_cU/view] - MSNBC

No Generation Without Representation [https://www.thenation.com/article/politics/biden-youth-government/] - The Nation

Youth voters saved Democrats and America in 2020. Can they do the same in 2022? [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2021/6/22/2036553/-Youth-voters-saved-Democrats-and-America-in-2020-Can-they-do-the-same-in-2022] - Daily Kos

NextGen America Reaches One Million Young Americans in Campaign to Encourage Vaccinations [https://www.mychesco.com/a/news/national/nextgen-america-reaches-one-million-young-americans-in-campaign-to-encourage-vaccinations/] - My ChesCo

Marking El Paso anniversary, Biden reaches out to Latino leaders [https://www.latimes.com/politics/story/2021-08-03/biden-latino-leaders-el-paso-shooting] - LA Times

Best,

Cristina Tzintzún Ramírez
President
NextGen America

----------------------
NextGen America
268 Bush St. #2919
San Francisco CA 94104-3503

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/68caba91-65fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/00952661-b1fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDk1MjY2MS1iMWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1DU9Mral0ntrqcrIdpLtuXJSm6y80D1r1mB0E5Qnn4I=&id=109799863

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Joe Biden Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Pentagon press secretary John Kirby confirmed to Fox News on
Sunday evening that the administration will not give priority
evacuation to Americans in Afghanistan over Afghans applying for
visas.

"It's not going to be just Americans first."

Peter --

The Taliban have made a fool of Joe Biden.

America's southern border is being overrun
with hordes of illegal aliens.
Our economy is crippled because of the
Chinese Covid bioweapon.
The world is laughing at us and Joe Biden has
fled into hiding!
Quid Pro Joe must go.
If Joe Biden refuses to resign, Republicans
must impeach him before Quid Pro Joe wrecks our country for good.

75 million Americans are fed up with
inaction.
It's time to take a stand. Will you become a
citizen co-sponsor?

For four straight years, the Democrats and
the Fake News Media tried to impeach and remove President Trump
from office.
They put our country through hell alleging
"Russian collusion" without a shred of evidence! Nancy Pelosi's
House even voted to impeach Trump not once - but TWICE!
And when evidence came to light showing that
Joe Biden did everything the Democrats and the Fake News claimed
President Trump did, nothing happened.
Enough is enough. I'm tired of the Swampy
double standard!
Quid pro-Joe Biden abused his power as Vice
President. Americans will not tolerate this. I will NOT tolerate
it.
That's why I filed Articles of Impeachment on
Joe Biden.
I need you to join this fight: become a
Citizen Co-Sponsor by signing your "Impeach Joe Biden" petition!
After you sign, I'm asking you to please
consider going the extra mile by chipping in $100, $50, $25, $15
-- whatever you can most afford -- to the "Impeach Joe Biden
Fund" and help me build momentum across America to IMPEACH JOE
BIDEN.
The Biden Crime Family must be held
accountable.
So please, after you become a citizen
co-sponsor to impeach Joe Biden, consider donating before the
deadline.
I'll keep you updated.

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

I'm tired of the Swampy double standard! Quid pro-Joe Biden abused his power as Vice President. Americans will not tolerate this. I will NOT tolerate it. That's why I filed Articles of Impeachment on Joe Biden. I need you to join this fight: become a Citizen Co-Sponsor by signing your "Impeach Joe Biden" petition! After you sign, I'm asking you to please consider going the extra mile by chipping in $100, $50, $25, $15 -- whatever you can most afford -- to the "Impeach Joe Biden Fund" and help me build momentum across America to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN. The Biden Crime Family must be held accountable. So please, after you become a citizen co-sponsor to impeach Joe Biden, consider donating before the deadline. I'll keep you updated. -- Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA) Paid for by Greene for Congress This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. Fellow Conservative,

My name is Brian Hawkins. I am a black, conservative pastor running for Congress. Although I am African American, as you can see from my photo above, I do NOT support the Black Lives Matter organization, _let me tell you why._

But first, let me warn you: What I am about to say will get me labeled as an “Uncle Tom” by the radical-Left. They will target my campaign and try to defeat me because I am promoting freedom of thought to the black community. [**I will need your support after I expose the truth about BLM, so please consider pitching in just $5 or $10 after you read my message.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e60f615ddfcb4dd9a452617863444410&_e=KsAVd1lvGE9CGz6_ROoFrsVe41sJW-28cTe2tts2z-HlH0gBLgwF4dIORODEvcO2O57sNtI3-AkvooKaWElAL-3CbcPvoEAdg6OvoE9rnsgu3A32-VYPTsh8pZU_gbVntbo6fAFruIK1tQCnS_13gUeT4pcGiwGs5NZilonaA_jFe2oaxF5KwKVugL93f-7UYv6ZbQcHjsNVsef0f1Cz8Uyy7Y0Lv-VyPTHDEJGppmkKSyy_3okMeOz_8ysodOVrPgqzrHCbYf-BGPl903YrOVRWKxsPckO7_5qEzSDAhr2GPZfgWVcsTz9myKGj1j860yBJTMuR6OVwkd5PWTAC6E9cZbaBMXNFIpGcJEoiOUj72Fn8PU4_KLithEmmXK3TItIMENivJbOkAl1rLhRDNqgi56fwVgLYZOGLjxNw_VtRBxHbn4wxBRRpHh7j6WlWOavs2Q2-djzXJ06cK67RaQ%3D%3D)

BLM is a racist organization that uses the death of black people to fund and empower Democrats – most of which, are white.

You see, Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive.

Over this past Independence Day weekend, the BLM Utah chapter called the American flag a _‘symbol of hatred’_ in a Facebook post. They went on to say, _“When we see this flag, we know the person flying it is a racist.”_

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e60f615ddfcb4dd9a452617863444410&_e=KsAVd1lvGE9CGz6_ROoFrsVe41sJW-28cTe2tts2z-HlH0gBLgwF4dIORODEvcO2O57sNtI3-AkvooKaWElAL-3CbcPvoEAdg6OvoE9rnsgu3A32-VYPTsh8pZU_gbVntbo6fAFruIK1tQCnS_13gUeT4pcGiwGs5NZilonaA_jFe2oaxF5KwKVugL93f-7UYv6ZbQcHjsNVsef0f1Cz8Uyy7Y0Lv-VyPTHDEJGppmmwFo8-clkzA3JiM7JMuwGRSfo5vHrivL29UZemY17tdpYX7JuWdVFvZF6lExJR_zVRt3TXQUC1rvgp5uqd2A_GOCVd_9MurzuiDEptiMig4hP6M06cdCeH2rRg4shkLDbNZ8Vyqkm3tj_gwPGF21heq6eMwPDZCJ5bsllQ8f-htArv9gmNSOrvdm47meZG-I90nRrNR9I5EWN4Ojcu0EliruRl2h329o5GhE-9feVwXg%3D%3D)
I am proud to have the American flag flying outside my home. I am proud to be a black American in 2021 – where I have equal opportunities as white men and women.

But the BLM organization uses _anything_ to divide us – to guilt and fool Americans into funding the lives of corrupt Democrats under the guise of social justice.

[**We cannot allow them to take a symbol of freedom, the American flag, and turn it into a weapon for their agenda. We must stand up right now and fight back against their rhetoric.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e60f615ddfcb4dd9a452617863444410&_e=KsAVd1lvGE9CGz6_ROoFrsVe41sJW-28cTe2tts2z-HlH0gBLgwF4dIORODEvcO2O57sNtI3-AkvooKaWElAL-3CbcPvoEAdg6OvoE9rnsgu3A32-VYPTsh8pZU_gbVntbo6fAFruIK1tQCnS_13gUeT4pcGiwGs5NZilonaA_jFe2oaxF5KwKVugL93f-7UYv6ZbQcHjsNVsef0f1Cz8Uyy7Y0Lv-VyPTHDEJGppmlalsnkQ3-w4O3OlTkMkF-X5XIh3L8ca_QjJryQnQcEufP1PNn0QF4Y6iQWcy-9oRbX8XMWXyAs7PEAjZ7Cv_YVCeXV3KyvQ-iZC11ejUlEH2Lx4B87COVwU35fnMGoOCu5jX1y8fOokIx4hEdxunXx0r0mCX_G0AE74sRPSIQq_iUoVU_L-lPyL9FmwSC-aFdeCcDqQINLAsWZeCWXvw-uKkR7-F7xVN8eRGlO8nzv3A%3D%3D)

Which is why I am running for Congress, to show Americans everywhere that there ARE black conservatives who are fighting to break the chains Democrats use to restrict and control minority communities.

[**Please, if you are in the position to give, help me deliver the truth about BLM and the Democrats to the entire nation. With your help, we can make meaningful change in Washington and elect a strong black conservative to end the Democrats’ racist Republican narrative.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e60f615ddfcb4dd9a452617863444410&_e=KsAVd1lvGE9CGz6_ROoFrsVe41sJW-28cTe2tts2z-HlH0gBLgwF4dIORODEvcO2O57sNtI3-AkvooKaWElAL-3CbcPvoEAdg6OvoE9rnsgu3A32-VYPTsh8pZU_gbVntbo6fAFruIK1tQCnS_13gUeT4pcGiwGs5NZilonaA_jFe2oaxF5KwKVugL93f-7UYv6ZbQcHjsNVsef0f1Cz8Uyy7Y0Lv-VyPTHDEJGppmmA2_V96HtLjyB7cXSLlBQQlZWi7LRymJGosPhmdHmlpBmbGxC_yO-h7PZzkmXGZ_XmGn1WIVbzsEflSTD5K_UXPQkvUccyPMbDeqT5JU07HQshzr5fWPWytUWNKQqLgndoz3n53yK0lfHjLSocc3rpul41y_lRAF0R9UNuNejkjfL3CtmzgmwPjPmouOTgQDGDITgoMJmPLTCgIPv863TkAm8d8pIHByVPxefODpYi2Q%3D%3D)

My team and I have hit what’s called the “summer slump” -- a major slowdown in political donations during the summer months. That means fewer people are opening fundraising emails like this one.
But when you’re running against an incumbent Congressman, especially one with a big national profile like Cawthorn, you can’t slow down.
That’s exactly why we spent the weekend knocking on doors and connecting directly with voters across Western NC.
Our path to victory relies on talking to as many people as we can, as early as we can, and as often as we can. We need to make sure voters hear our campaign message of love, hope, and a new path forward -- and that takes continual organizing and the resources to make that happen.

clean_body: | = | | Peter, Thank you for opening this email -- seriously, we know you get a lot of emails. Plus, it’s summer. = | | | = My team and I have hit what’s called the “summer slump” -- a major slowdown in political donations during the summer months. That means fewer people are opening fundraising emails like this one. But when you’re running against an incumbent Congressman, especially one with a big national profile like Cawthorn, you can’t slow down. That’s exactly why we spent the weekend knocking on doors and connecting directly with voters across Western NC. Our path to victory relies on talking to as many people as we can, as early as we can, and as often as we can. We need to make sure voters hear our campaign message of love, hope, and a new path forward -- and that takes continual organizing and the resources to make that happen. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks so much for your support, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Nina Turner
subject: Our justice journey is not over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
We’ll be making a big announcement soon that you won’t want to miss.

Our justice journey is not over.
I’ve always said that we are going to do great things together and that our movement doesn’t stop because of one race.
I’m going to take some time to decompress, spend time with my family, and rest a little bit. And then, baby, we’re coming back stronger than ever.
The mission stays the same — we are going to continue to fight for the poor, the working poor, and the barely middle class.
We are going to keep fighting for policies that lift up families like Medicare for All, a $15 an hour minimum wage, and the Green New Deal.
And we are going to fight harder than ever for campaign finance reform and an end to dark money in politics.
So stay tuned because we’ll be making a BIG announcement soon that you won’t want to miss.
But for now, thank you again to all of you who gave your time, your talent, and your treasure to our campaign.
It’s ok to be disappointed. I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t disappointed too. But we _cannot_ be deterred in our justice journey.
There’s too much work still to do. And the only way we’re going to make progress for ALL of us is if we continue to stand together.
Thank you again for everything, and we’ll be in touch with more soon.
With love and gratitude,
Nina 💜

* * *
Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
---

PO Box 91956
Cleveland, OH 44101
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: CDR Kirk Lippold (Ret.)
subject: Answering this SEAL’s distress call
body:
Navy SEALs rescue other people ... so, I was deeply moved when one asked for help from my veterans' group.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZUIldmJ9Whc9axR0ykyChw/zoHI9qbOtmpu8f4Jt763UjKw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Help22.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZUIldmJ9Whc9axR0ykyChw/zoHI9qbOtmpu8f4Jt763UjKw)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/oarnv1V7iLz0NffBHjs892pQ/zoHI9qbOtmpu8f4Jt763UjKw)
Patriot,

Navy SEALs rescue other people ... so, I was deeply moved when one asked for help from my veterans' group.

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/oarnv1V7iLz0NffBHjs892pQ/zoHI9qbOtmpu8f4Jt763UjKw) Let's call him John. (For obvious reasons, I can't tell you his real name.)

Not only was John one of the chosen few--the 15% to 20% of candidates who make it through the brutal selection course at Coronado, California, and earn the right to wear the SEAL trident--but John had also survived multiple combat tours.

**You see, combat for elite troops like SEALs can mean conducting missions every single night ... sometimes, even more than one follow-on mission in the same night.**

It's intense, profoundly dangerous, exhausting work that can expose SEALs to extreme violence. Sometimes, the ugliness and loss can break your heart.

SEALs will seldom tell outsiders this, but their work can take a severe toll on their hearts and minds, not to mention the toll on their wives, kids, parents, and extended families.

I'm sure you understand that being a SEAL was more than a job for John. It was his calling ... a core part of who he was.

So, when John left the Navy, he struggled deeply.

**Patriot, without a job and without direction, John was overwhelmed with crushing sadness. He didn 't know what to do with his life ... or what should come next ... or who to turn to. He felt utterly lost.**

Thankfully, he turned to Help22.
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/oarnv1V7iLz0NffBHjs892pQ/zoHI9qbOtmpu8f4Jt763UjKw)
John's meetings with a Help22 life coach gave him hope, motivation and support to take the next steps in life. He not only committed to stay alive, he started a new career.

Patriot, John was one of the lucky ones.

**Every single day, 22 veterans commit suicide.**

That's why my co-founders and I launched HELP22--to save veterans' lives. Here's how HELP22 works:

Right now, we offer counseling and life coaching sessions to any veteran who wants help, anywhere in the world--whether in person, by phone or via Skype or FaceTime.

Veterans simply go to our website and set up their appointments.

It's all free. Veterans don't pay a penny.

**But since so many veterans urgently need professional help, HELP22 is now beginning its outreach nationwide. We 're recruiting psychiatrists, psychologists, therapists, and others with special training to offer their services to desperate veterans for free.**

It's vitally urgent for HELP22 to get professional care to struggling, suffering veterans.

[**Patriot, will you help me save the _next_ SEAL? The next soldier... sailor... airman... Marine? You can do that with your best gift now of a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or even more.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/oarnv1V7iLz0NffBHjs892pQ/zoHI9qbOtmpu8f4Jt763UjKw)

[**Please give a special $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can afford right away.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/oarnv1V7iLz0NffBHjs892pQ/zoHI9qbOtmpu8f4Jt763UjKw)

Thank you so much!

Commander Kirk Lippold
US Navy (Ret.)

P.S. Patriot, 22 veterans commit suicide every day. But HELP22 gives desperate veterans the uplifting, motivating messages and care they need to hope again...and to live again. [**Please help me save a veteran 's life with your most generous gift, immediately.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/oarnv1V7iLz0NffBHjs892pQ/zoHI9qbOtmpu8f4Jt763UjKw)
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/oarnv1V7iLz0NffBHjs892pQ/zoHI9qbOtmpu8f4Jt763UjKw)

Help22 is pending as a Tax Exempt Organization Under Section 501(C)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Your Donations will be Tax Deductible As Allowed by Federal Law and the Laws of Various States upon approval.

clean_body: Navy SEALs rescue other people ... so, I was deeply moved when one asked for help from my veterans' group. | | | | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Help22. We encourage you to. | Patriot, Navy SEALs rescue other people ... so, I was deeply moved when one asked for help from my veterans' group. Let's call him John. (For obvious reasons, I can't tell you his real name.) Not only was John one of the chosen few--the 15% to 20% of candidates who make it through the brutal selection course at Coronado, California, and earn the right to wear the SEAL trident--but John had also survived multiple combat tours. You see, combat for elite troops like SEALs can mean conducting missions every single night ... sometimes, even more than one follow-on mission in the same night. It's intense, profoundly dangerous, exhausting work that can expose SEALs to extreme violence. Sometimes, the ugliness and loss can break your heart. SEALs will seldom tell outsiders this, but their work can take a severe toll on their hearts and minds, not to mention the toll on their wives, kids, parents, and extended families. I'm sure you understand that being a SEAL was more than a job for John. It was his calling ... a core part of who he was. So, when John left the Navy, he struggled deeply. Patriot, without a job and without direction, John was overwhelmed with crushing sadness. He didn 't know what to do with his life ... or what should come next ... or who to turn to. He felt utterly lost. Thankfully, he turned to Help22. John's meetings with a Help22 life coach gave him hope, motivation and support to take the next steps in life. He not only committed to stay alive, he started a new career. Patriot, John was one of the lucky ones. Every single day, 22 veterans commit suicide. That's why my co-founders and I launched HELP22--to save veterans' lives. Here's how HELP22 works: Right now, we offer counseling and life coaching sessions to any veteran who wants help, anywhere in the world--whether in person, by phone or via Skype or FaceTime. Veterans simply go to our website and set up their appointments. It's all free. Veterans don't pay a penny. But since so many veterans urgently need professional help, HELP22 is now beginning its outreach nationwide. We 're recruiting psychiatrists, psychologists, therapists, and others with special training to offer their services to desperate veterans for free. It's vitally urgent for HELP22 to get professional care to struggling, suffering veterans. Thank you so much! Commander Kirk Lippold US Navy (Ret.) P.S. Patriot, 22 veterans commit suicide every day. But HELP22 gives desperate veterans the uplifting, motivating messages and care they need to hope again...and to live again. Help22 is pending as a Tax Exempt Organization Under Section 501(C)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Your Donations will be Tax Deductible As Allowed by Federal Law and the Laws of Various States upon approval. (C) 2021 Illoominate Media 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

body:
It’s up to us to keep the Left from plunging freedom into extinction... | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=7fa44d5f68b7431b9927a49d81f423a2&_e=U2k5aFx0GPer0ma4RZ9xdgzorhXK9kADXMUcf3h2JTNTJCwlo5zuFs-5FqTssskV8Tv-4A7WBFmttucD4gbLJl4Oibwt2BKJN9MHbBMOJNTUbJNCA-6jvcDxXk67WGcdTIS17usLbvaCV_pEpAQBEgJxauiEUAuXRbCUOBMahJJzItGcH0WnLefllkfshNhz0dNzU5vUlg4pSGuZxursDecVdbOJBIwx_MLqvkKXpcoAGL9RevY53WAJKdsVHhmF2Q0khZZwzz0MA4GqWGcUhFquDq3y9UojK6T2MD0SXECg6k52ycGx7M2Rl07I0RRhHv_gKrfMreGrhlhq7p2BkrGOgJZACJZ8Vr0n35L7uqUYxnkXNztpo-tN43ZmMN1_PrKwJTMlPVUF69MCQTW60HlqF7pKNu8iPgOFDbf5ns8h3wb9HSd5BJClD4uy5l6s9rBCLrRMhYxj9-zQ_IQCDwXpmjx4iWJ54zLPm8A2ZHY%3D)

Peter,

President Ronald Reagan once said that freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. Right now, Washington Democrats are attempting to prove him right.

Well I have a message for them:

**_Come and take it. I dare you._**

Freedom is the most precious thing in the world. Our country was founded upon it. Thousands of Americans have lost their lives fighting for it. Now it’s up to us to pick up the torch and defend it against the Left’s attacks.
[**JOIN THE FIGHT TO DEFEND OUR FREEDOM**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=7fa44d5f68b7431b9927a49d81f423a2&_e=U2k5aFx0GPer0ma4RZ9xdgzorhXK9kADXMUcf3h2JTNTJCwlo5zuFs-5FqTssskV8Tv-4A7WBFmttucD4gbLJl4Oibwt2BKJN9MHbBMOJNTUbJNCA-6jvcDxXk67WGcdTIS17usLbvaCV_pEpAQBEgJxauiEUAuXRbCUOBMahJJzItGcH0WnLefllkfshNhz0dNzU5vUlg4pSGuZxursDecVdbOJBIwx_MLqvkKXpcoAGL9RevY53WAJKdsVHhmF2Q0khZZwzz0MA4GqWGcUhHSyBv1VN-8V0WMrCQeqw6lV4KpoC1Gf0e2-j6qP1ZcgpaTAfoUedGVD0L-fctglN23Z91_kfzWGxz7CY-0u0ArK_OnzAqPogzqS25lU3gRoLnn-RR2_ujXTP78db4VNuqqBFwAumzT3-llqWEbZZDb3E_xrdLAfbci_UZJeB8jpt7oYGqmqE8nB7iVyxIJjLazrOSNnUz9ChCii7rYIXAQ%3D)
I can tell you right now that winning this fight won’t be easy. Dems have gotten so drunk on power that they will do anything to get another taste.

But Peter, I like our odds. I know that together we can keep the Left from plunging freedom into extinction in this generation.

_[**If you want to help me make that happen, I urge you to chip in whatever you can to the Freedom Fighter Fund right now. >>>**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=7fa44d5f68b7431b9927a49d81f423a2&_e=U2k5aFx0GPer0ma4RZ9xdgzorhXK9kADXMUcf3h2JTNTJCwlo5zuFs-5FqTssskV8Tv-4A7WBFmttucD4gbLJl4Oibwt2BKJN9MHbBMOJNTUbJNCA-6jvcDxXk67WGcdTIS17usLbvaCV_pEpAQBEgJxauiEUAuXRbCUOBMahJJzItGcH0WnLefllkfshNhz0dNzU5vUlg4pSGuZxursDecVdbOJBIwx_MLqvkKXpcoAGL9RevY53WAJKdsVHhmF2Q0khZZwzz0MA4GqWGcUhBZSWmEXd2U0HaGOogkEvlzmGmIg0s4S9GK2Bs-Xg7pck_BcJ-Vk3RXMCnMhqpXzu6lwXUsVkKblZER-IT_3w9WyZ6c7_ljpgUDw_aFsw4FZhfR4FnylpVm3XEgrcj4wydd6HL4oReDSJ6F5eVMsc4SoL7I7pTeUvlr0WrJ-8x0rDqVtTfmHjUH2jUbtSEw4AWj16HbKYkpa3YmC0w2GbhI%3D)__[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=7fa44d5f68b7431b9927a49d81f423a2&_e=U2k5aFx0GPer0ma4RZ9xdgzorhXK9kADXMUcf3h2JTNTJCwlo5zuFs-5FqTssskVF9jeX6yc0q3fEFkhfAO_YAmI6E-BZ3h0bIXPzFu_csPq10u0LdgJocMiHE2cQG9uuIXBCAkbuJw0wW-KRBatgH5HZ_MdyLj_TYJdPwKFw4w7grv1BhJUfwm3YNiFBVdUJEg2S0l45lNHqDthO_mItPgOjdbT6yD7EPbWlKhRjciqTdJ6ALIUjCobWX7eNAGjqKWPdTYaxSDQKm98dWHdXoebDBQ7N5xhunfZfDhNS0csClvWfHle18LZRJH66pNKhiqOeydZHJp3xYaJ7KuWnGP8UsiAP1xUJ3B0p41G1KR7L_YsFtf3juqdvGg5Ua38yegiPByp_J53KtHtlJT46G_zlOrCNCj7rIMExIgXD0rM7Qq-zKYrfFvuCnKL7gGRCVK6cQ5MDwNBCRi2w8ax_3gAlciKdSIJB_tbHmGWT5s%3D)_****
[**CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=7fa44d5f68b7431b9927a49d81f423a2&_e=U2k5aFx0GPer0ma4RZ9xdgzorhXK9kADXMUcf3h2JTNTJCwlo5zuFs-5FqTssskV8Tv-4A7WBFmttucD4gbLJl4Oibwt2BKJN9MHbBMOJNTUbJNCA-6jvcDxXk67WGcdTIS17usLbvaCV_pEpAQBEgJxauiEUAuXRbCUOBMahJJzItGcH0WnLefllkfshNhz0dNzU5vUlg4pSGuZxursDecVdbOJBIwx_MLqvkKXpcoAGL9RevY53WAJKdsVHhmF2Q0khZZwzz0MA4GqWGcUhGJJzM0vnYyIyBlteAR_a7Ks-m2iL84E-BBL8p7FVM4Vq8U2pzNMMo1pte02Ntg_0ClLt5mgER8gImEzuI9Axd7MKGnrJs5NIXgEpqhPT9DI9yD-6gylxWxHB4xO2CsSc472xkWQHIE9wn1dx8H42NUhOgRDSlT5tU8WPFutJHSAYcbT0mpqtqCsjpGfd3x5MeIfHBSH0zgoB58jQ6_s82I%3D)
This is a battle worth fighting, Peter.

For freedom,

Harold _[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=7fa44d5f68b7431b9927a49d81f423a2&_e=U2k5aFx0GPer0ma4RZ9xdgzorhXK9kADXMUcf3h2JTNTJCwlo5zuFs-5FqTssskVF9jeX6yc0q3fEFkhfAO_YAmI6E-BZ3h0bIXPzFu_csPq10u0LdgJocMiHE2cQG9uuIXBCAkbuJw0wW-KRBatgH5HZ_MdyLj_TYJdPwKFw4w7grv1BhJUfwm3YNiFBVdUJEg2S0l45lNHqDthO_mItPgOjdbT6yD7EPbWlKhRjciqTdJ6ALIUjCobWX7eNAGjqKWPdTYaxSDQKm98dWHdXr-OdytyK8kPoG--Ma2raQg3YpnHZG2DmVj81ywRgSiXHqo5GMlmQNB8b_zlLdsGzQtMPE-AcQyBX9gL9xAgz-p0uHsmmbqXSWPWN7u_jvWzt3BudZHaxzHKJOjJ-39nPqyIBOq_j5GvLMRFZskf0oYltG7TpBFoGNH-AFbT0KreD6C2-Gu--k0j99App5T0YDHPb9ZukTBzJMABrA44uYE%3D)_****

name: Seth Moulton
subject: My thoughts on the situation in Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34157456/301085196/-1416185584?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTYwNzI3OC1iOWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXF_qXn4vPQL9EGtBnXR06sbJ3EOvRPVmOAXlynBTRs=&emci=476fe428-a2fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=aa607278-b9fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=194769) To say that the situation in Afghanistan is anything short of a disaster would be dishonest. Worse, it was avoidable. The time to debate whether we stay in Afghanistan has passed, but there is still time to debate how we manage our retreat. For months, I have been calling on the Administration to evacuate our allies immediately—not to wait for paperwork, for shaky agreements with third countries, or for time to make it look more “orderly.” While I am proud that a strong, bipartisan majority in Congress voted to expand the Special Immigrant Visa program in support of our Afghan friends, my worst fear has become realized: That ultimately this effort would distract from what is truly needed, an immediate evacuation. The fact that, at this hour, we have not even secured the civilian half of Kabul Airport is testament to our moral and operational failure. We need to rectify this immediately. America and our allies must drop the onerous visa requirements where a typo can condemn an ally to torture and death, and the military must continue the evacuation for as long as it takes. We should also not forget that the tragedy that unfolds before us today was set in motion by Secretary Pompeo and President Trump, who negotiated in secret with the Taliban terrorists last year in order to meet a campaign promise. Today’s tragedy must also serve as a wakeup call to Congress, who holds ultimate, Constitutional responsibility for sending our best and brightest to war on the nation’s behalf. Successive leaders of both parties have failed to hold the votes for re-authorizing this conflict for the last two decades since we invaded to find Osama bin Laden. For that, all of us in Congress should be ashamed. Finally, to our Afghanistan veterans and their families, I am too honest to stand here today and try to convince you that your sacrifice was worth it. Some will find solace in the millions of Afghans, especially women and girls, to whom we gave two decades of a taste of freedom—more hope, liberty, and opportunity than they would have ever had without the tireless work and irreparable sacrifices of our troops. We accomplished our initial mission: Osama Bin Laden is dead and the threat of terrorist attacks against Americans originating from Afghanistan is diminished. We also provided the security needed to accomplish a peace process that, unfortunately, was never realized. Others will forever ask that haunting question I heard too often from my own Marines in Iraq: “Why are we here?” The best answer I could ever come up with was simply, “So nobody has to be here in our place,” and while that was never an adequate answer, it is true. And I remain proud to be from a nation whose brave young men and women stand on the ramparts of freedom around the globe, as they do at Kabul Airport today. -Seth | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34157457/301085197/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTYwNzI3OC1iOWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXF_qXn4vPQL9EGtBnXR06sbJ3EOvRPVmOAXlynBTRs=&emci=476fe428-a2fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=aa607278-b9fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34157458/301085198/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTYwNzI3OC1iOWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXF_qXn4vPQL9EGtBnXR06sbJ3EOvRPVmOAXlynBTRs=&emci=476fe428-a2fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=aa607278-b9fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34157459/301085199/341442065?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTYwNzI3OC1iOWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXF_qXn4vPQL9EGtBnXR06sbJ3EOvRPVmOAXlynBTRs=&emci=476fe428-a2fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=aa607278-b9fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34157460/301085200/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTYwNzI3OC1iOWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXF_qXn4vPQL9EGtBnXR06sbJ3EOvRPVmOAXlynBTRs=&emci=476fe428-a2fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=aa607278-b9fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=194769)

clean_body: | | | To say that the situation in Afghanistan is anything short of a disaster would be dishonest. Worse, it was avoidable. The time to debate whether we stay in Afghanistan has passed, but there is still time to debate how we manage our retreat. For months, I have been calling on the Administration to evacuate our allies immediately—not to wait for paperwork, for shaky agreements with third countries, or for time to make it look more “orderly.” While I am proud that a strong, bipartisan majority in Congress voted to expand the Special Immigrant Visa program in support of our Afghan friends, my worst fear has become realized: That ultimately this effort would distract from what is truly needed, an immediate evacuation. The fact that, at this hour, we have not even secured the civilian half of Kabul Airport is testament to our moral and operational failure. We need to rectify this immediately. America and our allies must drop the onerous visa requirements where a typo can condemn an ally to torture and death, and the military must continue the evacuation for as long as it takes. We should also not forget that the tragedy that unfolds before us today was set in motion by Secretary Pompeo and President Trump, who negotiated in secret with the Taliban terrorists last year in order to meet a campaign promise. Today’s tragedy must also serve as a wakeup call to Congress, who holds ultimate, Constitutional responsibility for sending our best and brightest to war on the nation’s behalf. Successive leaders of both parties have failed to hold the votes for re-authorizing this conflict for the last two decades since we invaded to find Osama bin Laden. For that, all of us in Congress should be ashamed. Finally, to our Afghanistan veterans and their families, I am too honest to stand here today and try to convince you that your sacrifice was worth it. Some will find solace in the millions of Afghans, especially women and girls, to whom we gave two decades of a taste of freedom—more hope, liberty, and opportunity than they would have ever had without the tireless work and irreparable sacrifices of our troops. We accomplished our initial mission: Osama Bin Laden is dead and the threat of terrorist attacks against Americans originating from Afghanistan is diminished. We also provided the security needed to accomplish a peace process that, unfortunately, was never realized. Others will forever ask that haunting question I heard too often from my own Marines in Iraq: “Why are we here?” The best answer I could ever come up with was simply, “So nobody has to be here in our place,” and while that was never an adequate answer, it is true. And I remain proud to be from a nation whose brave young men and women stand on the ramparts of freedom around the globe, as they do at Kabul Airport today. -Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d086a26409f148a982b8e1ee23ecef32&_e=AX1r9Zcn8svEKPnh2fwpMqM0OzYqfZbMaPzkYfVzEjzlbTlJAnt2Q2DIsh5yog9YQhmOpXJVYlzKqQNSw6HBSs_w7VhpCIuQtLlebLfAravoVDXGiwWKbwPRXhBdYdrweXvCRktTcA74Ww0xqjZUQyNTBCn-OU-ykQdIAH76D1L_6NWZsm4dvPw1fkNoZXxE5BIzoq3brIlMPeJRl3lOL-sEc1146Qvkca-UepkEgoQDBLcci-sv9H4C2mV2nTjeCPKBuzhvNlp-e6qo6JlzL44V2V0tjenaNbDt_lUT9i9SEtf4WyEG6jLBEOIKKHKK7ZTPH8lrIbEBP9vuidODhA0wh50034p1WpYkgPRa_k4cWTOn6CF7s4UcfbhyhIentD8of1J5Z8DNSoLUzLJj97fUBPhyCVQ_l8n2qjusHLWhbRAUnwVAue1_6vDKgkluroKUiR-NdrgHgk7Jy_s0y6BHOTJ37vedOefcfjB245Mk4f_8LsGrmeJG6CtqXFEuU4oruJ4yhZ09lYBKkTOxXA%3D%3D)**

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d086a26409f148a982b8e1ee23ecef32&_e=AX1r9Zcn8svEKPnh2fwpMqM0OzYqfZbMaPzkYfVzEjzlbTlJAnt2Q2DIsh5yog9YQhmOpXJVYlzKqQNSw6HBSs_w7VhpCIuQtLlebLfAravoVDXGiwWKbwPRXhBdYdrweXvCRktTcA74Ww0xqjZUQyNTBCn-OU-ykQdIAH76D1L_6NWZsm4dvPw1fkNoZXxE5BIzoq3brIlMPeJRl3lOL-sEc1146Qvkca-UepkEgoQDBLcci-sv9H4C2mV2nTjeCPKBuzhvNlp-e6qo6JlzL44V2V0tjenaNbDt_lUT9i9SEtf4WyEG6jLBEOIKKHKKYNj23pZY_IpOVgD2PuqsPHQJzpJJ0MY-z4HRafk46K8CdICjWoAAy6LMREOqDAUxUix2yLaACtUOU9M6uagJe0ELsJX_FHGBYYwKVcj2wk4_wsWTgEHbABXPM9qw3Z-WJ0_AxTg3rbJ9DpIhARYcOY7gj586zO-py-eE0SmiNfPOWWgIAgusj7-WA1n73nb6qgECZyRQnEzv3eZ5SLl8sQ%3D%3D)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
Inaugural MMM Tailgate Celebration

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ef5b82e1d3e5451793a7ebd420f74767&_e=BS95Gnl4z5ObrkZIB6joSOdzwxjL3IOuwLDa5E7mynZEEdRWCCvl16xVM2ysPx-w7p-r4hULsPnBsIl47Sq7vi7jVXFx3UmYJzxl7RNJExrgMfoyARXnGLG0PnAakmYT8cbbLzb6H_Hgj91kCzs5GnCL6oHoEUmBlweBUV24k43WW-bqCp372S0llDxPeVXfz3MfBEc1L7q2cabxxIBAgPMj_C4bW6K4IuxF0fT2LRr2Kz-b0eSUb2od8gKm7UvJTWODQ--uBLe1fcCW93DNEc1HO-tG1_CxZB4RSY4Y0LHYKA_lEUr8gtWrtp9Tf4RVa0WkL91YP1HLM2Tej3OmQpC_0aZTmxKCp2IrKtRWPeorqdEZPLkZdEtaH6iufD9NXMITAaPkrDGothrEeXXYLRnDC7AwvQMMWXYvRJV1j97mEh5QLfeFc3pNHu_jgLI5AyBz5-i1icei_YOd-nELTuwS3KDOEe_r-sNb6XweO4-3v7l8tzISBAPlUhSkwP1il-SkECjFaEPMHSW7g8CWOHcY-exw5ZaLajPsIO2_olg%3D)
---
Hey there,

I want to personally invite you to ** my Inaugural MMM Tailgate Celebration ** before the Hawkeye game against Kent State on September 18th! We are incredibly excited to be joined by U.S. Senator Tom Cotton to celebrate everything that makes Iowa great.
| [**CLICK HERE FOR TICKETS**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ef5b82e1d3e5451793a7ebd420f74767&_e=BS95Gnl4z5ObrkZIB6joSOdzwxjL3IOuwLDa5E7mynZEEdRWCCvl16xVM2ysPx-w7p-r4hULsPnBsIl47Sq7vi7jVXFx3UmYJzxl7RNJExrgMfoyARXnGLG0PnAakmYT8cbbLzb6H_Hgj91kCzs5GnCL6oHoEUmBlweBUV24k43WW-bqCp372S0llDxPeVXfz3MfBEc1L7q2cabxxIBAgPMj_C4bW6K4IuxF0fT2LRr2Kz-b0eSUb2od8gKm7UvJTWODQ--uBLe1fcCW93DNEc1HO-tG1_CxZB4RSY4Y0LHYKA_lEUr8gtWrtp9Tf4RVa0WkL91YP1HLM2Tej3OmQjq3zeEEOxLIU5sgl6_FHzAdDff_fKfJtQ2O7aL7V5qQ1-qfyT6BXZA_0OVmZfMkBlsCPLq9FcHTFVMCJ38_nVh-nr4xHhwOpk-aNLxXocdnvgYQ5_Wl3D4AoBkd5iSgYTsADt9lrTuWbBrR5OVbjcRNvnk2v4z69qA3IzoxzPsywMh6UQ20gy1L59baqZKrvTZfvAtJUVdjBp6CLA9hbeo%3D)
---

Here in Iowa, we take pride in working hard, raising our families, and winning. Whether it’s by six points or six votes. I’m grateful for the opportunity to meet with you, talk about the issues facing Iowa, and share some of our goals for the next year!
[**Come out and join us!**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ef5b82e1d3e5451793a7ebd420f74767&_e=BS95Gnl4z5ObrkZIB6joSOdzwxjL3IOuwLDa5E7mynZEEdRWCCvl16xVM2ysPx-w7p-r4hULsPnBsIl47Sq7vi7jVXFx3UmYJzxl7RNJExrgMfoyARXnGLG0PnAakmYT8cbbLzb6H_Hgj91kCzs5GnCL6oHoEUmBlweBUV24k43WW-bqCp372S0llDxPeVXfz3MfBEc1L7q2cabxxIBAgPMj_C4bW6K4IuxF0fT2LRr2Kz-b0eSUb2od8gKm7UvJTWODQ--uBLe1fcCW93DNEc1HO-tG1_CxZB4RSY4Y0LHYKA_lEUr8gtWrtp9Tf4RVa0WkL91YP1HLM2Tej3OmQrgpImuNxlNi8CtOeSiMBO9vzxtloMXxMMVPrAotdz7UzkywxB2Rl_1iPjQgiGUF_EW8_8jM3TK7rSpQS5s7CHl7tJPHmXYpryTioNA4cyjNBVXYJgJ6mhhWJ4oc823ica5DKV9sH9Z4e7txIHVaCU-zguqSTccptEdqVBrxDXH7-cgK0u0cwdDHxfgUfN0f5kPSw3QEMnG5TWzv6rP_THk%3D)
---

I would love to tell you how much your support means to me, Iowa, and our great nation, I hope you’ll attend!

**If you’re unable to make it, but would still like to show your support:[you can do that here!](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ef5b82e1d3e5451793a7ebd420f74767&_e=BS95Gnl4z5ObrkZIB6joSOdzwxjL3IOuwLDa5E7mynZEEdRWCCvl16xVM2ysPx-w7p-r4hULsPnBsIl47Sq7vi7jVXFx3UmYJzxl7RNJExrgMfoyARXnGLG0PnAakmYT8cbbLzb6H_Hgj91kCzs5GnCL6oHoEUmBlweBUV24k43WW-bqCp372S0llDxPeVXfz3MfBEc1L7q2cabxxIBAgPMj_C4bW6K4IuxF0fT2LRr2Kz-b0eSUb2od8gKm7UvJTWODQ--uBLe1fcCW93DNEc1HO-tG1_CxZB4RSY4Y0LHYKA_lEUr8gtWrtp9Tf4RVa0WkL91YP1HLM2Tej3OmQtqUWmoagjh9hgLCFo38s_G80zy60RbACLmuCfnfkGRXhFUeQ6ejD1I33MhkjuChmt0AGsm01o75_N6mb1eqmep2TfpOrCIOGsEKdka4e0cZ3F22ifkfY3iROzRyb8pDGDe5hgdu7McgfrdpBy1oWS2kvU5ktV8N4aKYpO4jK_oL3e_Y_zG9RYKqILoh7p5ofs4o0EkQtznMiCiQ76S35qE%3D) **

I can’t wait to see you soon,

[](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ef5b82e1d3e5451793a7ebd420f74767&_e=BS95Gnl4z5ObrkZIB6joSOdzwxjL3IOuwLDa5E7mynZEEdRWCCvl16xVM2ysPx-w7p-r4hULsPnBsIl47Sq7vi7jVXFx3UmYJzxl7RNJExrgMfoyARXnGLG0PnAakmYT8cbbLzb6H_Hgj91kCzs5GnCL6oHoEUmBlweBUV24k43WW-bqCp372S0llDxPeVXfz3MfBEc1L7q2cabxxIBAgPMj_C4bW6K4IuxF0fT2LRr2Kz-b0eSUb2od8gKm7UvJTWODQ--uBLe1fcCW93DNEc1HO-tG1_CxZB4RSY4Y0LHYKA_lEUr8gtWrtp9Tf4RVa0WkL91YP1HLM2Tej3OmQkSe3p7nafTOTmmA_CsWoqKhauTcL0-X8GK8wlmnmowdvTdTqxbYbJaJ_CERh3vu03obpe4odikoXl0yTESMKNYFjkx8u13uhw4tsU7GO-p8RNUVVGsJa2b1RTcrLfd-dLNCvIMzve-rKvA9p1Qv68IOU6rPrczY8AQNS3SW3wsIU03hisWRM067srEDnxyRf2tDJwffBDZVofWZKCJ7Rx4%3D)
