To update your email preferences, . | | – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – – This is a pivotal moment for U.S. History, Peter. And Joe Biden is nowhere to be found. We’re seeing shocking images from Afghanistan, and reports of a swift and decisive victory for the Taliban. And all the while -- nothing from the White House. Radio silence. He’s vacationing at Camp David, and won’t be back until Wednesday. This is a total abdication of American Responsibility and a major show of weakness by Joe Biden’s Democrats. | After twenty years of war, the Joe Biden pulled our troops out of Afghanistan in the most awful way imaginable. Videos show our allies literally clinging to Air Force jets -- desperate not to be left behind. And all the while, Joe Biden is nowhere to be found. This is not the leadership that Americans deserve. Joe Biden must go. Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: I can’t believe what this has come to…
body:
I hope the President hears this message, loud and clear!
---
| | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email.
---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| As President Biden ordered the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan, he said his heart goes out to the brave Afghans who supported our troops over the past twenty years - but they deserve more than thoughts and prayers, they deserve our support and loyalty. I have grave concerns that the Biden Administration has abandoned the interpreters, guides, and their families who supported the American-led forces, handing each of them a death sentence at the hands of the Taliban.
And my heart also goes out to the young girls and women who will now be oppressed, abused, and raped by the brutal terrorists who have regained control of Afghanistan. We rightfully talk about the importance of equality and human rights, but yesterday's retreat was a catastrophic loss for the women of Afghanistan and has imperiled the future of an entire generation of young women.
President Biden owes our military and their families who served, bled, and died in Afghanistan an explanation. All that they accomplished and all that they gained over the past twenty years was lost within days. I speak to these brave families, they are my friends and family, and they deserve to hear from their Commander-in-Chief.
Tiffany
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | Smiley for Washington, Inc. | P.O. BOX 1058, Richland, WA 99352

Peter, we’ve had a productive August!

I stepped away from the campaign trail to allocate Virginia’s funds from President Biden’s American Rescue Plan.

And our Democratic majority delivered ‐‐ _we’re expanding broadband access, supporting small businesses, investing in our schools, and so much more!_

I was proud to stand with my colleagues and deliver for Virginians, and I look forward to continuing this progress as your Lt. Governor.

But Peter, we’re in danger of losing our momentum. **If my far‐right opponent wins in November, our historic achievements for Virginians will be erased.**

[**So I’m humbly asking you: Will you contribute $3 to elect me as Lt. Governor? body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xv-rN5B9HpPudqb_9qLUeTMsNW3VbMQ7N9ytzr-NGHww4pqJQWTzIp0h0WKxhtg8LC2rs8_PK_D4SVHfXkHGNVbMqMbTK46O9HdFrqI8nFvtxoHm-O3LwEPU_wMPWPC25C4Ibul_q_oLpqC9O2lYTR0zeyVQa0MoDCnqo9h3c8WSHHR7khhC1lI6IXG8ehDFblkAcUvjtWqKhmObg35gJ6ErPXgwn1komPQXX2MScR48Bqoz71mTgFyC3rR-0ld6md4ITkkI0fira1D32-rbFBXWaOiDaFdm338TVJ8_iSWtjNg32wQ4nOxnhzeJ13WYZw/3ei/2QJzNf3STGy0qLdbApxiFg/h0/eYPnIqN4jTTOrLDqQsd3H2vLVXwfiqRcK1yVqUve-Yk)
Derek, I’m going to try and be as civil as I can about this.

Millionaire Republican J.D. Vance launched his campaign for Senate. You know as well as I do -- a guy who calls affordable childcare “class war against normal people” doesn’t belong anywhere near the Senate.

We can’t let his announcement derail us from expanding our Democratic majority -- political experts say that Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip.

[**Our grassroots team CAN win, but only with the resources to stay strong in what will be one of the most competitive and expensive races of 2022 -- can I count on you to be one of the 345 supporters we need to split a contribution between my campaign and Common Good of $25 or more by midnight tonight?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XlXMadvVnPxrO_OBbxmNJQ_sUXiXswt6wmzD0-mkzeyJRwKpfkDhu_9AYueMfoFjLh2uDkj6hgegPqy1pXCdggdKwUHnzb1PV0dPqtvXF-DM08AtDj124x-GYd6q1ZHv5Tn0kdAhtnnTtWkZuqjfnBBRmperXQIugBAh8LeC4MU2nldrxcJm61DjefM0vnSzgCr-zAvi_b603N303JStFPxyeczkyZ5mi43kSasjHqDG2vyw9gqFboPKJlrXNwiu5qERapOespmuaKktA1305Bz8xod6Q0ckgEwiPSKb-fWn88nr-K-zusRmaCvCs7uCZTDjWt0nAliXpaO7ZbGOoT0/3ei/2QJzNf3STGy0qLdbApxiFg/h1/OYPMFRVAF2sJ9SGK5HJXL2vAYpxqcYr9qJ6nYmlGV5Y) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xv-rN5B9HpPudqb_9qLUeTPry3-UNyFIrM5uR-sDJHs62IhnjHtRUVEY30ikMz3ixTiBM5-mod9hMcBXrKVEUww9zYU9SEBLd_f2IEUOblrXBl0pCklYscWuee2gAnnVrUalwvXqXqXFUzrfpccDHlGRUBmhnhxfHWFyDqg2dH3HAmDfjvjTRohYOBbGxzmEz8sWHZq01WZORKpLHS2zQOlC-V-6-YLaz6NgQ4MANEda6NG5yhlJb8eUuukayx3o4cBCBBZQYrh_Hd32I6LARaa8c7nWP52h1jH098JwME596D74Zxni3S3MCCzcYrHgyw/3ei/2QJzNf3STGy0qLdbApxiFg/h2/YB_knnGE_k7pIMKNS317XeKcUIGmcT-zjsGCNKWWnk4)
---
Vance doesn’t have a clue about the needs of hardworking Americans, but what he DOES have is the full backing of Trump’s billionaire friends and a Republican Super PAC with over $10 million at its disposal.

I won’t let Vance shift the conversation away from everyday Ohioans and their needs. I’m here to run a campaign that is 100% focused on putting workers front and center. **But I need your help to make sure that we’re the loudest voice in the room -- pitch in now to help get our message out and organize across the state!**
[**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xv-rN5B9HpPudqb_9qLUeTP5RiXH4iOaz9UHbecsDkJydDcfODiRiNCasT8_8V5_2RQYs8O50_OTvWDBtnDBlBYSFz4GB612-i5-1D_QCjI3M10yy1Pn-Q4lrD5aePGv1TqIoxBslAPOaZ9H2GhRpph_4G2gGazrCcsGlfqka5TUf1C_0rS33G-1asEMCXZWPIcKErlg01XFW8Pl_ZwNg3BDVL33aNyUpHCEo_IUk0wtupFDc5AcMDf_P7qBzWyjW2vp6wf-zZmYjsfvYRZ6CW6RlrrpuCbCOBdjWqXKiW9rITyfwwuPDbHinTq5404Fbw/3ei/2QJzNf3STGy0qLdbApxiFg/h3/ZbpHIGaUqzoghDWAkOxtytcib9Acy4dgkCG8F2Re3RM)

Team, Ras is ready to get bold about the basics as the next Governor of Iowa, and that starts with education. **Last week, Ras rolled out his plan for getting Iowa’s public schools back to #1 in the nation again and has held roundtables with area educators in Cedar Rapids, Waterloo, and Newton.** Iowa educators are working tirelessly to support students and families, but they are frustrated because they are not valued by Governor Reynolds or the GOP legislature. Our public schools are the backbone of our communities, a catalyst for economic mobility and, at our best, a source of pride for our state. But right now, there’s a major disconnect between politicians and our classrooms — and Ras wants to change that. ****[If you want to elect a governor who prioritizes education, will you pitch in your first $10 to support Ras?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34161875/301100423/-858979165?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210816education_tr_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWY2MzBjZi1jNWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oflj1p0nzD0-hxvsqIftydgkPgqIHxlh6T5o3QAn5Bc=)**** While **Governor Kim Reynolds rejected $97 million in federal funding for schools, and has instead prioritized private and for-profit charter schools** , Ras has a plan to properly invest in our public school system so every child in Iowa can experience a first-rate education. Through his K-12 Education Plan, Ras plans on prioritizing students and families regardless of zip code, background, or family income, empowering educators with the support they need, and putting public dollars into public schools. ****[Iowa was once home to the best schools in the country, and we can be that state again under Ras’s leadership. clean_body: | = Team, Ras is ready to get bold about the basics as the next Governor of Iowa, and that starts with education. Last week, Ras rolled out his plan for getting Iowa’s public schools back to #1 in the nation again and has held roundtables with area educators in Cedar Rapids, Waterloo, and Newton. Iowa educators are working tirelessly to support students and families, but they are frustrated because they are not valued by Governor Reynolds or the GOP legislature. Our public schools are the backbone of our communities, a catalyst for economic mobility and, at our best, a source of pride for our state. But right now, there’s a major disconnect between politicians and our classrooms — and Ras wants to change that. **= While Governor Kim Reynolds rejected $97 million in federal funding for schools, and has instead prioritized private and for-profit charter schools , Ras has a plan to properly invest in our public school system so every child in Iowa can experience a first-rate education. Through his K-12 Education Plan, Ras plans on prioritizing students and families regardless of zip code, background, or family income, empowering educators with the support they need, and putting public dollars into public schools. = **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Team Ras ** | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. body:

| | **Friend,

First: the Radical Left defunded the police.

Then: Crime SKYROCKETED. Murder MULTIPLIED. Our communities are in DANGER.

Now: George Soros – the Radical Left’s dark money piggy bank – spent $1,000,000 to defund police EVERYWHERE.**

---
| [THE ONLY WAY TO SAVE OUR NATION: JOIN THE FIGHT >>](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=37f1c28487&e=e4728463fc "THE ONLY WAY TO SAVE OUR NATION: JOIN THE FIGHT >>")
---
| **To say I’m angry is an understatement. I’m quaking with anger. As a former sheriff, there is nothing more important than the safety of our communities, and as a law and order loving patriot I know you agree.**
---
| [I NEED YOU TO COMMIT. WILL YOU FIGHT WITH ME? >>](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=b75eeacaac&e=e4728463fc "I NEED YOU TO COMMIT. WILL YOU FIGHT WITH ME? >>")
---
|
# Illhan Omar, AOC, and the Far-Left and their Socialist agenda is hurting everyday Americans. With no consequences, no security, no police... they’re encouraging criminals!

But with Soros’s checkbook in their back pocket and his billions bankrolling their socialist agenda, we don’t stand a chance. Unless...

I’m calling on your help, and help from other patriots like you who understand just how dire the situation is - because we can’t afford to back down from this fight.

[The only way to restore law and order in America is to restore a conservative majority in Washington.](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=aac38fa38e&e=e4728463fc)

If you join the fight, we can stand tall, and send a message back to Soros, the squad, and the Radical Left that their RADICAL AGENDA WILL NOT WIN. But – and I won’t mince words – if you sit on the sidelines, we will lose.

[I can't stand by and let this happen. Can you?](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=c7d3c0606a&e=e4728463fc)

Thank you,

Troy Nehls

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. name: Lisa Scheller
subject: My statement on the crisis in Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress Inc
body:
President Biden's disorganized policy regarding the withdrawal of American
troops from Afghanistan has directly led to the rapid rise of the Taliban's

Peter,

President Biden's disorganized policy regarding the withdrawal of American
troops from Afghanistan has directly led to the rapid rise of the Taliban's
control in Afghanistan. The complete failure of his leadership is highlighted
by the images of Taliban fighters seizing American weapons and supplies that
were "left" for the Afghan army. While he promised that no American would need
to be airlifted out of Kabul, images of airlifts from the embassy harken back
to Saigon.

The women of Afghanistan now face a dark, horrific future with reports of
threats from the Taliban to erase all the progress that has been made for the
past 20 years. I am outraged and so should anyone who claims to be a proponent
of Women's rights, but it should be no surprise that the Taliban were able to
mobilize and seize power this rapidly. The American public deserves answers as
to how this staggering defeat was possible. Where are our elected leaders?

I urge all who know a veteran or a gold star family from the war in
Afghanistan to reach out and and offer support during this enormously difficult
time.

Sincerely,

Lisa Scheller

Paid for by Scheller for Congress Inc.

name: Matt Jacobs, Candidate for U.S. Congress (CA-26)
subject: The Taliban Have Retaken Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
My thoughts on this matter: **The Taliban have retaken Afghanistan. Nearly 20 years after 9/11, the Islamic fundamentalists who gave safe haven to Osama bin Laden and al-Qaeda are once again in control of the country.** This is a colossal failure, largely due to President Biden’s politically-motivated decision to announce a full troop withdrawal by the symbolic date of September 11, instead of letting conditions on the ground guide the withdrawal timeline. **As a federal prosecutor, I spent years investigating and prosecuting al-Qaeda terrorists who murdered Americans.** ** ** During this time, I got to know many brave U.S. servicemen and servicewomen who sacrificed so much in Afghanistan to keep us safe here at home. My thoughts are with these courageous Americans right now – and with the families of those who never returned. I’m eternally grateful for their heroic efforts to protect us by bringing the fight to the terrorists who attacked our homeland on 9/11. My thoughts are also with the people of Afghanistan. **Under Taliban rule, countless innocents will be executed and imprisoned. Women will once again be subjugated under medieval Sharia law. ** Two months ago, Democratic Congresswoman Ilhan Omar publicly equated the United States to the Taliban, while accusing America of committing “unthinkable atrocities” and “crimes against humanity.” **House Republicans uniformly condemned Omar’s absurd remarks. But sadly, only 12 of 220 House Democrats had the courage to criticize her – and my opponent, Democrat Julia Brownley, was not one of them.** The people of this district deserve a representative with moral clarity – a representative who cares more about doing what’s right than winning reelection. name: Josh Hawley
subject: Mid-Month Update

| | Peter,

I’m sure you’re aware that on September 14th, California is taking part in a recall election to remove Governor Newsom. I wanted to let you know why I’m voting NO to recall Governor Newsom.

Governor Newson has been a tireless leader through some tough times in our community and for our state. He's guided us through this deadly pandemic and was there for us during three trying and tragic fire seasons. He's helped ensure that California leads the way on tackling climate change and he does not deserve to be recalled.

[**Will you please add your name now if you plan to vote “NO” on September 14th?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34163729/301108642/-1807511792?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210816_1_1&refcode2=409e9ef8-ccfe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDllOWVmOC1jY2ZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcfUd2lXwnZicqr1Li4BUc4WTqPGsft6qu7fg6_eRjY=&emci=c70694d3-ccfe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=409e9ef8-ccfe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2678920)

• Ballots are being mailed out today, August 16th

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: I lost my legs in Afghanistan. I need your help to defeat Joe Biden.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58142886:Ja5B8UlNE:m:1:3253819041:83453D10F491B21917F977A81DC3B7C8:r)
---
| Peter,

I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan.

Now, Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace.

I want to share with you the lessons I learned in Afghanistan, but first, I urgently need your help to defeat Joe Biden and stop his America Last agenda. Can I count on you to help?
---
| [DONATE NOW TO STOP BIDEN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58142886:Ja5B8UlNE:m:1:3253819041:83453D10F491B21917F977A81DC3B7C8:r "DONATE NOW TO STOP BIDEN")
---
| For me, this is a particularly heart-wrenching disaster...

**On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. **As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. One member of our team was an Afghan interpreter. Once, he was on a mission and his tennis shoes got stuck in the mud so he finished the mission barefoot. He had a young son and daughter. He fought alongside us and was a friend to America.

**That was the night I discovered the last explosive device I ever found by stepping on it. **I remember every moment of the explosion, down to my teeth rattling so hard I wasn't sure that they were still in my mouth. The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't.

**Every day since when I wake up I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. **The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home.

**Now, Joe Biden has sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death.** He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind.
[**> > As a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title. If you agree, please help me defeat him and stop his disastrous America Last agenda. << **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58142886:Ja5B8UlNE:m:1:3253819041:83453D10F491B21917F977A81DC3B7C8:r)
**Another lesson I learned in the Army is that nobody can do it alone: we need our whole team to work together, especially when there are life or death consequences on the line. **That's why I'm determined to stay in the fight for freedom now. Even if my injury cut short my time on the battlefield in Afghanistan, I am going to keep fighting to protect my fellow soldiers and our allies.

**To do that, we must come together to defeat Joe Biden, elect more conservative veterans to Congress and restore the America First agenda that President Trump championed.**

[**So, I 'm asking: just like I relied on my fellow soldiers in Afghanistan to save my life, I need to rely on you now. Can I count on you to help?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58142886:Ja5B8UlNE:m:1:3253819041:83453D10F491B21917F977A81DC3B7C8:r)

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. Now, Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. I want to share with you the lessons I learned in Afghanistan, but first, I urgently need your help to defeat Joe Biden and stop his America Last agenda. Can I count on you to help? | "DONATE NOW TO STOP BIDEN" | For me, this is a particularly heart-wrenching disaster... On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. One member of our team was an Afghan interpreter. Once, he was on a mission and his tennis shoes got stuck in the mud so he finished the mission barefoot. He had a young son and daughter. He fought alongside us and was a friend to America. That was the night I discovered the last explosive device I ever found by stepping on it. I remember every moment of the explosion, down to my teeth rattling so hard I wasn't sure that they were still in my mouth. The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't. Every day since when I wake up I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home. Now, Joe Biden has sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. Another lesson I learned in the Army is that nobody can do it alone: we need our whole team to work together, especially when there are life or death consequences on the line. That's why I'm determined to stay in the fight for freedom now. Even if my injury cut short my time on the battlefield in Afghanistan, I am going to keep fighting to protect my fellow soldiers and our allies. To do that, we must come together to defeat Joe Biden, elect more conservative veterans to Congress and restore the America First agenda that President Trump championed. | "DONATE $10" | "DONATE $25" | "DONATE $50" | "DONATE $100" | "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT" | Together we can stop Joe Biden and restore America First leadership! | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS | | Mast for Congress | MastForCongress.com PO Box 3016, Stuart, FL 34995 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Josh Mandel
subject: Josh Mandel's Statement on Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh
body:
August 16, 2021 CONTACT:
press@joshmandel.com

**Josh Mandel's statement on Afghanistan** CLEVELAND, OH - Today, Josh Mandel, a Marine two-tour Iraq War veteran and candidate for U.S. Senate, issued the following statement on Joe Biden's failed leadership in Afghanistan:

On October 2, 2008, Joe Biden stated, “How we leave [Afghanistan] makes a big difference.”

Today we are seeing the result of Joe Biden’s ineptitude and failure as a leader. If Biden would have followed President Trump’s strategic plan to withdraw in May, today would not be going down in history as Saigon II.

Among the multitude of Biden failures on Afghanistan, his decision to abandon Bagram Air Base before all Americans were evacuated will go down as one of the worst decisions by a Commander-in-Chief in United States history. Make no mistake, this is a slap in the face to every American who served in Afghanistan over the past two decades.

Notwithstanding the debacle before our eyes, today we pay tribute to the over 2,400 warfighters who paid the ultimate sacrifice so we can live free. While Biden failed you, the American people love you and owe you an eternal gratitude for the blanket of freedom that you’ve provided our kids, our communities and our country. While others your age sat home playing video games, watching TV and going to bars, you stood up in the spirit of Isaiah 6:8 and said, “Here I am. Send me.” ### | | [](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=c5c860675ee044eba82d45951c5daa65&_e=NHAImnjo4JQPJz6RQadmCBkfyntil73CdA5z00Ogv1jD6b8jS4Pj-_5nArz8sHd5LCxkzXZmqdyQjCEACBPJzGwzOcSujTWCOW3c4zz8gk80bpibhL7zIU5uNx91rup_WC0aUuQYgbcFIKGYy9Qp3rXdDRqQ2qPszYvGzoGkZ8Jckf2KEMI1CVWu1RzGvI2pdzJe4k6E1gJPsTFdFxqPf-1syCHr-sF2J8gu_Ycw8UwbgEPSVmXxdOHLGoRuwJoGxuJCwAe5xL_8xf3OsDTPbw%3D%3D) | [](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=c5c860675ee044eba82d45951c5daa65&_e=NHAImnjo4JQPJz6RQadmCCjIeh-tBGDlu1g12LFCKNkh_dZSr_QYGZJxJK0-BC1M1ZzAcK1Y0Rts8o92m1uE6jXQ7YLT6qgSBDqvIffTPtv5pKkzDwf7rHOZQdCWbMZX2mXxWsYGsLXYjypRkbUjz8UGqQyw-qx6-UO06ctLmWFc7KutYXXrnPjZWKnt9nH4N5hpkQQHs_0UsDQu8Hz0tN-FPDlSUwTUL2rE1IRu8gF1fHjH0LGI2U93jP4wEyh_samF1V6pIneXAgcft9GGQg%3D%3D) | [](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=c5c860675ee044eba82d45951c5daa65&_e=NHAImnjo4JQPJz6RQadmCHCbhK9BuLCoXFzlwzNlk3SYL76_ieXEqyQvdUayamEltCNmkfCOAl2T4rxZTMZ3b6a7KLf_w17JQqrNdqY6vuMwkgBJdVoR6iQs9NQmLnHegB1MsFJbljkd4qT9pPZaVIPmgHAy5h_0hVA7n8DeMJX5gMpzuWViERrYKvVjDRdER2OnYvEKXLselrilqITb4x_t5hUOhcI89UwU4e7wsam6GH8JMdhOjJo2QV5gWHfmZc4EGXK-vyY9Kbb3Az-1t1tz08W1YCROYvZb45Rm4s8%3D)

name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c385%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=IItRo0CgO4ZWKO%2bY0z2nRQ&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65938%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NqMJzmptSyuvcSzITmP1QA&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65939%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fIbw%2boddSOAi%2fFRg5ptFbA&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65930%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u69%2bDAkw66HhvoiPWnRtsg&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c385%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=IItRo0CgO4ZWKO%2bY0z2nRQ&sysid=1)_

If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | Warm Regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 |

body:

In order to protect our democracy, we can't let Donald Trump and the Treason Caucus normalize the Capitol insurrection. That's why we're working to ensure they're held accountable and remind voters how their elected officials betrayed their oath of office by attacking our democracy -- but we need your help.

name: John Castorani
subject: Mr. President, the blood is on your hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
I spent 19 months inside Afghanistan, so when I tell you that there was a right way to do withdraw from this war, and that there was a wrong way to wiToday I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=a4d12a3f6abb44b1a3625e4b2395870e&_e=lK02Uw9lwnazltt6wOonW3t-C8ioOIgDrq1HfiJnCLlm4ryTYvOfVT3n18gknoWiSn4_Uu5JCSkYk5N_kAVG8hsLwSXz8rsLQ5jKF0_w23kinjCYR9pO51sfE-17lWIXGo-ajAGm1n6YAGwk_cHi1zHX4cUWUOKkgbis0hzWAB5-bUFO1F0onBk_i4V7REZ6KFjB6OhRmgOycLca__PXayXjPnoyPNMIf7o_NAW8lJm66eQkJoOG0t_VW4GbP0zyZpIbTlTYPuzaXy_ViqbD2xb2HQfn1FMG9PtewRUZE-K6901qFt1J8Gr5jbB0nhGItJOPiOkN-boDIlnhe2ofQGhXonVHuqmRNGNuWLvY-VULAURhS3H8Qqzcis29AFDvFXZ6_muLkAnoC3SPRq6b_14sWP25cVGzeqhdLUYk4B5xuhYTZEo35IWpsAx5iXxPcA-FoVORckkuCm0RswAbwA%3D%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My heart is heavy this morning as I write this email to you. As a veteran of the Army and the United States intelligence community **who deployed to Afghanistan 3 times** over the course of nine years, I’m watching in horror as desperate families cling to U.S. military aircraft in hopes of finding safe haven from the Taliban.

**I spent 19 months inside Afghanistan, so when I tell you that there was a right way to withdraw from this war, and that there was a wrong way to withdrawal, I mean it**. President Biden clearly misled the American public in July when he said that “ _**There’s going to be no circumstance where you see people being lifted off the United States embassy**_.”

But what angers me more is that I know men like me, who serve in our special forces, will bear the brunt of Biden’s decision to pull out of Afghanistan in such a reckless manner. How do I know? **Because I spent six years tracking down the Islamic terrorists who killed our Ambassador in Benghazi, Libya on September 11th, 2012 while Hillary Clinton slept.**

**This is not a withdrawal; this is an abandonment leading to a humanitarian crisis of the likes we have not seen this century**. My heart is breaking for my brothers that I lost on the battlefield, **and for the members of the special forces who are going to be responsible for cleaning up this mess in the near future**.

This crisis perfectly sums up why I’m running for Congress, and today **[I’m asking you to lend your support to my campaign](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=a4d12a3f6abb44b1a3625e4b2395870e&_e=lK02Uw9lwnazltt6wOonW3t-C8ioOIgDrq1HfiJnCLlm4ryTYvOfVT3n18gknoWiSn4_Uu5JCSkYk5N_kAVG8hsLwSXz8rsLQ5jKF0_w23kinjCYR9pO51sfE-17lWIXGo-ajAGm1n6YAGwk_cHi1zHX4cUWUOKkgbis0hzWAB5-bUFO1F0onBk_i4V7REZ6KFjB6OhRmgOycLca__PXayXjPnoyPNMIf7o_NAW8lJm66eQkJoOG0t_VW4GbP0zyaoM8ooTTMWARfCikCDjsuUCytKVgxsJOpu9TqTcYKrQQf19y9OBbPdq7t_gxAYe4K7rEnHzFmXiV66Xmibjh-WXAws-AOYTSA8fdf9sAiip_S-w26X4VHH12gL93AuNTIhMm20xGDxNW5YH5yCKfGImUjbSz7TtW9YQURMraMiVIPzXJSWVKlWly5zlmHGt5-TY26G8zxgHAxEHJpzUDOQ%3D%3D)**. I don’t have to run for Congress, I’ve got a great job and a newborn son at home. But this absolute shit storm that Biden created should keep us all up at night.**I’ve interrogated Taliban terrorists at Bagram Airfield in Kabul, I can tell you on good authority that Biden was well aware that something like this could happen**.
| [**HOLD BIDEN and PELOSI accountable
Send an Afghan Vet to Congress ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=a4d12a3f6abb44b1a3625e4b2395870e&_e=lK02Uw9lwnazltt6wOonW3t-C8ioOIgDrq1HfiJnCLlm4ryTYvOfVT3n18gknoWiSn4_Uu5JCSkYk5N_kAVG8hsLwSXz8rsLQ5jKF0_w23kinjCYR9pO51sfE-17lWIXGo-ajAGm1n6YAGwk_cHi1zHX4cUWUOKkgbis0hzWAB5-bUFO1F0onBk_i4V7REZ6KFjB6OhRmgOycLca__PXayXjPnoyPNMIf7o_NAW8lJm66eQkJoOG0t_VW4GbP0zyT2XoLvSR1cyiUdzokdqspWEOIv80enkiyAuMQrXFRk1JVQ6dv3c2c-P2jifu5-sIOc6GotpYsGZNVRjBscPBu6U9HIFvKJazYrwN4AhEu7TNN7niUjHLB5KerUGzqUJjcxVnzAo3GCzwb0cGtH8qlhyYRynzYDx1wU7cJuLPMfO85Ogk8Yx2DO13R8RU9dBXxXmDTZrwVnxgF5KY38-Sug%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=a4d12a3f6abb44b1a3625e4b2395870e&_e=lK02Uw9lwnazltt6wOonW3t-C8ioOIgDrq1HfiJnCLlm4ryTYvOfVT3n18gknoWiSn4_Uu5JCSkYk5N_kAVG8hsLwSXz8rsLQ5jKF0_w23kinjCYR9pO51sfE-17lWIXGo-ajAGm1n6YAGwk_cHi1zHX4cUWUOKkgbis0hzWAB5-bUFO1F0onBk_i4V7REZ6KFjB6OhRmgOycLca__PXayXjPnoyPNMIf7o_NAW8lJm66eQkJoOG0t_VW4GbP0zyP4WQIJzr2VQZW0FpPz4dVVZXw2Joda3d3hw3t0A2UuHGHI2aY4mLGcT48tnbHQLdyS_F29mjqt5K8ZEE6J2ZsM7vF9PE7iOOOe0NBzneMR7ebFedaRfy7eXVcC3AOh9kReQlyK04ZDZqqd_BxlJkntQpv5Vbkg-PkKeOkHzt7hj41kAC9aC9kkbmDjzjBqmuU-Gzv9PZKK-KrzyYfj-mug%3D%3D)
An article in the Wall Street Journal summed up the situation rather succinctly saying, “ _**The jihadists the U.S. toppled 20 years ago for sheltering Osama bin Laden will not fly their flag over the U.S. Embassy building on the 20th anniversary of 9/11**_.”

**The Taliban’s advances come as no surprise to us veterans of the Afghanistan conflict, I personally have deployed to Afghanistan 3 times during both my time in the Army and within the Intelligence Community**. We all knew that the Afghan National Army and Uniformed Police was an ineffective fighting force propped by U.S. logistics, U.S. air support and U.S. funding. Make no mistakes folks, our feckless "**leader** " President Biden was briefed on all of these facts, he was a U.S. Senator for the first 7 years of Afghanistan, the Vice President for 8 years... yet he still went through with a hasty withdrawal without addressing the possibility of a humanitarian crisis we are currently seeing. **Mr. President, the blood is on your hands**.

Folks, Democrats have complete control over Washington. **This abject failure happened on their watch, and they seem perfectly at peace to sit in their gilded offices as desperate Afghans die attempting to cling to American military planes evacuating our personnel**.

**Democrats have abandoned the Afghan people at their hour of need**. Our credibility as a superpower is shot. And what does Nancy Pelosi do? She tweets that “ _The Taliban must know the world is watching its actions_.”
[**HOLD BIDEN and PELOSI accountable
Send an Afghan Vet to Congress ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=a4d12a3f6abb44b1a3625e4b2395870e&_e=lK02Uw9lwnazltt6wOonW3t-C8ioOIgDrq1HfiJnCLlm4ryTYvOfVT3n18gknoWiSn4_Uu5JCSkYk5N_kAVG8hsLwSXz8rsLQ5jKF0_w23kinjCYR9pO51sfE-17lWIXGo-ajAGm1n6YAGwk_cHi1zHX4cUWUOKkgbis0hzWAB5-bUFO1F0onBk_i4V7REZ6KFjB6OhRmgOycLca__PXayXjPnoyPNMIf7o_NAW8lJm66eQkJoOG0t_VW4GbP0zyCrtKyp-2wUidY7zHEoSjYcXs8HSfp1u91Wv-ZrEiY4vqhoudhbCZiKVkSW3Xr1w8Ly2QbO64KnVK38YrgTrOaR1g9hAimkAqsr4i0xAyN0npgU5NTckp05W16a8HE2oy633AodHCj1i6880fXXjK6G3c4q4NNOwB5feWhAUNZ2ylEGSrBQuvgg_2Kq9wBiO18EK8UbfaW5Na_Iyqabkneg%3D%3D)
---

Republicans are by no means perfect, but had we had a seat at the table when these outlandish decisions were made, perhaps we could have stopped what we’re seeing unfold today. **President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have all but ensured that my children and possibly grandchildren will fight the Taliban like I have**.

**[Today I’m asking you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress, because I assure you that if I’m given the opportunity to serve, I’ll make sure Biden and Pelosi are held to account for these foolish decisions](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=a4d12a3f6abb44b1a3625e4b2395870e&_e=lK02Uw9lwnazltt6wOonW3t-C8ioOIgDrq1HfiJnCLlm4ryTYvOfVT3n18gknoWiSn4_Uu5JCSkYk5N_kAVG8hsLwSXz8rsLQ5jKF0_w23kinjCYR9pO51sfE-17lWIXGo-ajAGm1n6YAGwk_cHi1zHX4cUWUOKkgbis0hzWAB5-bUFO1F0onBk_i4V7REZ6KFjB6OhRmgOycLca__PXayXjPnoyPNMIf7o_NAW8lJm66eQkJoOG0t_VW4GbP0zyD_TP4GIFxDT3gqSivSDL6RQ6_Ck7_74FMHpX8ciKU4guGi8BF0Mm5mlMobJNlGKScEx3wsRxsnDLLFgtCGlPPVO6mbV5AWpaVxfgWrhvQ35NYG8HnTjeXG6EP7219v6Q7s15jBmgKqPkDOwYGB6lbS55JlZlxCrh6jbd2E07JaQWJrTgCgfxWXkvPlRyLUX4bsBl4R96XArwDBKJyDMp0g%3D%3D)**.
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=a4d12a3f6abb44b1a3625e4b2395870e&_e=lK02Uw9lwnazltt6wOonW3t-C8ioOIgDrq1HfiJnCLlm4ryTYvOfVT3n18gknoWiSn4_Uu5JCSkYk5N_kAVG8hsLwSXz8rsLQ5jKF0_w23kinjCYR9pO51sfE-17lWIXGo-ajAGm1n6YAGwk_cHi1zHX4cUWUOKkgbis0hzWAB5-bUFO1F0onBk_i4V7REZ6KFjB6OhRmgOycLca__PXayXjPnoyPNMIf7o_NAW8lJm66eQkJoOG0t_VW4GbP0zyVnlZ8EuVbcaUbfYAORfsehk3gwRwJ_56YaMTgdLxHuHO6sdRS0lwL9gl_XAyOB65ZEgLbSxSLX16K5N_WuuCqwy22lBGtjTstAAmaV8EEtOKRKLho6_Q8siCna6sxZzsvy94W2jfj8BVnP9fkc5N2RLfFs4GDwcYs0hQti25OLD_H3UdtEvcJ5-fuBdDD6MgSRRvFcSni_MyQ2QccApaJA%3D%3D) [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=a4d12a3f6abb44b1a3625e4b2395870e&_e=lK02Uw9lwnazltt6wOonW3t-C8ioOIgDrq1HfiJnCLlm4ryTYvOfVT3n18gknoWiSn4_Uu5JCSkYk5N_kAVG8hsLwSXz8rsLQ5jKF0_w23kinjCYR9pO51sfE-17lWIXGo-ajAGm1n6YAGwk_cHi1zHX4cUWUOKkgbis0hzWAB5-bUFO1F0onBk_i4V7REZ6KFjB6OhRmgOycLca__PXayXjPnoyPNMIf7o_NAW8lJm66eQkJoOG0t_VW4GbP0zy0Jpx67cdxbBaazhV1mXIu_dHxUNV1eSj0in_VgAq-gOiXfUsTwGSkVZkMi5R9A_T5873YTfWAReYospcnLzZKQlrQiW_O37-PT65knp5jof5kTz9fZXbNFmElKXrYL4EBhVZEjLlncM5yLLB4dxDpWEtr8gwo72b2us8Jt1bFuYsNNvTZVjEwYXRg-p5kj4_Gl22wr78HyKJRLj5_NPIYA%3D%3D) [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=a4d12a3f6abb44b1a3625e4b2395870e&_e=lK02Uw9lwnazltt6wOonW3t-C8ioOIgDrq1HfiJnCLlm4ryTYvOfVT3n18gknoWiSn4_Uu5JCSkYk5N_kAVG8hsLwSXz8rsLQ5jKF0_w23kinjCYR9pO51sfE-17lWIXGo-ajAGm1n6YAGwk_cHi1zHX4cUWUOKkgbis0hzWAB5-bUFO1F0onBk_i4V7REZ6KFjB6OhRmgOycLca__PXayXjPnoyPNMIf7o_NAW8lJm66eQkJoOG0t_VW4GbP0zyw9xX2KoQdlzwjioDwq2JwOqI61nF710mj_MwL-nshp4dFjkkUJLSoxFHlK1Dfj0-gQns0pwh_P_P4dVHFfjfu7RuI80hVv21pcLth5hVl29lrszS6g0N6s-jgXeJLeYUyE9NIlyy0osKkmlfQKjnVj8HNiECBarV168tueCQEXyzK6eDkyXuQYgskKlHZE6yTSwjSAKW5mbtrjvBVBBYUw%3D%3D)
---

**Having been to Afghanistan three times** I can assure you the people of Afghanistan want and deserve an end to the bloodshed, conflict and violence. The people of Afghanistan want and deserve peace and security, access to education, employment and the political process. **We have fought so hard together for the last two decades, our coalition and the Afghan people - we should not allow those hard-fought freedoms to be taken away by the Taliban**.

While we watch in horror from the safety of the United States, the Chinese Communist leadership in Beijing are toasting to our failure.

For America
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
---

Make no mistakes folks, our feckless "leader " President Biden was briefed on all of these facts, he was a U.S. Senator for the first 7 years of Afghanistan, the Vice President for 8 years... yet he still went through with a hasty withdrawal without addressing the possibility of a humanitarian crisis we are currently seeing. Mr. President, the blood is on your hands. Folks, Democrats have complete control over Washington. This abject failure happened on their watch, and they seem perfectly at peace to sit in their gilded offices as desperate Afghans die attempting to cling to American military planes evacuating our personnel. Democrats have abandoned the Afghan people at their hour of need. Our credibility as a superpower is shot. And what does Nancy Pelosi do? She tweets that “ The Taliban must know the world is watching its actions.” Republicans are by no means perfect, but had we had a seat at the table when these outlandish decisions were made, perhaps we could have stopped what we’re seeing unfold today. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have all but ensured that my children and possibly grandchildren will fight the Taliban like I have. . Having been to Afghanistan three times I can assure you the people of Afghanistan want and deserve an end to the bloodshed, conflict and violence. The people of Afghanistan want and deserve peace and security, access to education, employment and the political process. We have fought so hard together for the last two decades, our coalition and the Afghan people - we should not allow those hard-fought freedoms to be taken away by the Taliban. While we watch in horror from the safety of the United States, the Chinese Communist leadership in Beijing are toasting to our failure. For America John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia Don't want to receive our emails?

Hello friend,
My name is Domingo DeGrazia and I'm proud to serve with Kirsten in the State Legislature.
**Southern Arizonans couldn’t ask for a more experienced and dedicated leader, and it's my honor to endorse Kirsten for Congress.** **[I hope you will join me in supporting her grassroots campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34167328/301120438/558373307?refcode=X_081621_Endorsment_Degrazia&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmIzYmEzMy1kOWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cw3B5-9rG5NfFrjrbAwJaxEf5o8Hf7u5XAwEKcb5xzI=)**

In our time serving together, I’ve been inspired by her work ethic and commitment to improving the lives of Arizonans. Kirsten doesn’t shy away from hard work. I’ve seen her put in countless long hours researching bills, listening to constituents, and meeting fellow legislators – all for the benefit of the people she represents.
Whether it's fighting for much-needed criminal justice reforms, funding for our schools, or protecting the environment, Kirsten has been one of the strongest voices at the State Legislature. I trust her to bring that same enthusiasm and expertise with her to Washington as our next Congresswoman.
She’s in this race to make a difference for everyday Arizonans, not for the ego trip or her own political power. **I couldn’t be prouder to endorse Kirsten and have her as my representative in Congress.**

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WATCH: What Unites Americans?
body:
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=5c226ea41f6e4fd4aabe608b6477864d&_e=pDoqFEVS9oIqQhjXo-Kes2C4itMiePV1bYSt3lfEngKmZNPyqCehQuPq8nOgfKP8Ymb5nK25-Wb1rXkxEisrKV--wNm2TPDoeWHDGjuBSvVu4a6FViyHrTBxYTYgcwVbaZ2FSu36jKpyTgioSm4SWHkeQPvjDq5VC6ji8n2WqjHwSDOkdN5JRucF9BAtUFCem71b7m6MCIfqKd3aXyK2lqRi_99efULuBANE-c6x98SAU4mKnYWZRV3YRIShfB0wlyv1i0aneoKi-GUhMDbkeA%3D%3D) | |
---
Friends,
What unites us as Americans? Values and history.

I joined PragerU to explain how our shared values and history can unify us, despite coming from so many different places.

_**WATCH THE VIDEO**_
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=5c226ea41f6e4fd4aabe608b6477864d&_e=pDoqFEVS9oIqQhjXo-Kes5paAxSQzQ9SCaPTrIQUyqBkDd4NNg2QjrQDZPkHvlK0_PV-JCnSwGrgpzEU-7d0SNv4opHWfbJAEGMtfWE4qbDvwpaNfxi0FQPLswr5BkSRlvTxQ1UVc4RFD3syLe25UzmRC0jDMtUoBxNZIKyj-0cC6Lx3A_GtOaEdDQmyvfxUBObihgi8wZ9VovlqL88XiONLvpAsefEXtaDTF2bkeuPk4DPpgU2SMmmLHFHhWoWZFIG79aYBBgN2mSSUh7Es8oNDYGjztl3_CYOHmWnu7Hc%3D)
Here is a good quote from the video:

_We recognize America’s shortcomings but also see a nation always striving to become a 'more perfect union.' We see a nation with more freedom, more opportunity, and more minority protections than any place on earth._

_That’s what my immigrant parents saw._

_It’s what their American-born son still sees. What do you see?_

Watch the video, and share it with your friends and family.

God Bless,

Bobby
|
---

name: Mike Collier for Lt. Governor
subject: 20 years of incompetent Republican rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
We wanted to make sure you heard about this, folks: Yesterday, rain water flooded into the Texas Capitol — damaging a National Historic Landmark and the building where our state laws are passed and signed. Texas has seen one disaster after another under Gov. Abbott and Dan Patrick’s leadership. Abbott and Patrick can’t fix the damn grid and keep your lights on, and now, they can’t even keep water out of the Capitol. What happened yesterday was not only a disaster but symbolic, too — because the area of the Capitol that flooded was opened under the strong leadership of Democrats, Governor Ann Richards and Lt. Governor Bob Bullock, 28 years ago back when the state actually delivered. Now, we’ve seen 20 years of incompetent Republican rule. And all we’ve gotten for it is a rickety power grid, crumbing infrastructure, and a bunch of empty promises. Texans deserve better. That’s why Mike is so committed to building a movement to invest in our state’s infrastructure, improve countless lives, and move Texas forward into the 21st century. **It’s going to take a strong, people-powered movement to take on Dan Patrick and make our state work for ALL Texans. It means that all students and teachers, whether they are vaccinated or not, are REQUIRED to wear masks. This is utter lunacy. It is abundantly clear that Ralph Northam does not care about following the science and is just pushing the radical ideologies of the left. How does he expect teachers to teach with masks? How does he expect students to learn in masks? Nick is outraged by this drastic overreach by Ralph Northam. Ralph Northam has played politics with people’s lives and now he is stripping away their liberties. Nick is fighting back but he needs your support. Our mid-month deadline is almost here and we’re $5,029 short of our goal. Will you help us reach it? The mask hysteria has gone on for way too long. It’s time to step up and say no more. name: Donna Imam
subject: "You took the loan, you should pay it back."
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34169053/301125951/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzQ4NzkyMy1kZmZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIlaaflMdV2aUEZHQZ4lRL54OSiE3nJo_WFVtWbSHSw=)
**Americans currently owe $1.7 trillion in student loans, amount greater than Canadian economy**
_\- Fortune_
* * *

Let's talk about student loan debt, friend.

Last week, President Biden extended the federal student loan payment freeze until January 2022. In addition, there was limited student loan debt relief for borrowers defrauded by certain for-profit schools, but this amounts to a small fraction of the staggering $1.7 trillion in outstanding student loan debt.

This is a welcome announcement for those still struggling to pay the bills and secure lasting employment during the pandemic. It's also a reminder that we still need to address the root cause of the student debt crisis in this country.

Our education system doesn't hesitate to hand out mortgage sized loans to teenagers graduating from high-school. In many cases, students are led to believe these loans are the only way they'll graduate and find a high-paying job.

**When they graduate, they quickly learn it was a scam. There's no high-wage job on the other end for too many. Instead, they're stuck with massive payments along with compounding interest.**

But we still hear the critics: _"You took the loan, you should pay it back."_

In fact, two thirds of all American graduates "took the loan" and are now saddled with an average of $30,000 in debt -- a crippling barrier to financial security.

Young people in this country "took the loan" en masse despite not having all the facts. Without the freeze, some may even be in jeopardy of having their wages garnished.

**This problem needs to be addressed because falling behind in higher education and high-skilled training is the single greatest threat to economic prosperity and technological progress that we face.**

We need to act urgently on this issue. That means addressing the student loan scam and enacting debt relief so no one is left in crippling debt. We must also drastically lower the cost of education for those heading to college and vocational training programs now.

As a teaching assistant in college, in graduate school, and as someone who has continued to teach throughout my career, I know that technology should be driving the cost of education to nothing. Many educational institutions, including my alma mater Purdue University have lowered the cost of education over the past decade, so I know we can do this.

If elected, addressing this crisis, and working on the root causes of this problem to get to debt-free education, will be one of my highest priorities.

Thank you,

Donna

P.S. For more information about my platform on debt-free college, visit my education issues page **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34169054/301125952/-702044905?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzQ4NzkyMy1kZmZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIlaaflMdV2aUEZHQZ4lRL54OSiE3nJo_WFVtWbSHSw=&emci=e2487923-dffe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e3487923-dffe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7168977)**

| Friend, There’s one person to blame for the foreign policy and humanitarian **_CRISIS_** currently unfolding in Afghanistan - President Biden, who is asleep at the switch! Joe Biden’s complete failure to create a strategic plan for withdrawal has resulted in the current disaster that is _EMBARRASSING_ the country, and leaving our own in harm’s way... **We can’t accept this from the President of the United States - he has gutted American credibility, endangered Afghan families, and left Americans on the ground in Afghanistan in grave danger.**[**This is a failure that calls for President Biden’s IMMEDIATE RESIGNATION!**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=635677d2ff&e=c2296cffff)

**Will you sign on to the petition below if you agree?**

---
| I have personal experience with the horror that’s ongoing in Afghanistan. My parents fled to escape the Islamic reign of terror engulfing Iran - the same terror that millions of Afghan families now face as a result of the Biden administration’s complete failure! That’s why I know that these serious failures call for serious consequences - **President Biden must immediately resign for this horrific failure!** [**Sign on today to make your voice heard - we no longer have to accept this failed leadership!**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=c79ece19ae&e=c2296cffff)

_Amanda Makki_

_It’s time for Americans to stand up and say ENOUGH!_

clean_body: re: Joe Biden’s Resignation | TO: Peter Willis FROM: NCGOP HQ RE: President Biden Must Resign By now, we’re sure you’ve seen the news. In fact, “full retreat” may be generous because it implies that he’s engaged at all. The truth is that we haven’t seen Joe Biden speak in public in days. He’s still vacationing at Camp David. | | Not since Jimmy Carter has an American President appeared weaker and more feckless on the world stage. Joe Biden has failed us, Peter \-- and now he’s hiding from public view. It’s time for Americans to stand up and say ENOUGH! Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

body:
**FIRST:** Sarah came out in favor of a wealth tax so that ultra-millionaires and billionaires pay their fair share. It’s part of her big plan to create a tax system that works for everyone, not just those at the top.

**THEN:** Ron Johnson attacked Sarah because his backroom dealing led to a massive tax break for him and his wealthy campaign donors. He knows Sarah can defeat him next November -- and when she does, she'll make changes to better the lives of Wisconsinites.

**NOW:** We're coming up on our August mid-month fundraising deadline and we need to make up lost ground so we can fight back against Ron Johnson's attacks.

Sarah refuses to accept a single dime of corporate PAC money in this race. She’s relying on you to keep our campaign moving. Can Sarah count on your support ahead of tomorrow's fundraising deadline? | | Peter, We have huge news -- Jasmine was awarded **North Carolina County Commissioner of the Year** on Saturday night! She was honored to receive this award along with four other Commissioners from across the state for their work in response to the opioid crisis. name: Blake Masters
subject: You should be able to raise a family on one income
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
I started my campaign with a simple thought. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=44bea6441ec84377a5aa73fbd1f8aa7c&_e=OYdIRjUJ5sujwknLjgY1v9nu1Vn-fiJMKLafizlNULqAJ9yg7RwTZqOaYtjdKkULMAyVL8lAY1RhSSBjT3xTsJebrPtvQujSfFRlK_gOelwGEm0bnTgeRxZWOmKa0WWr9tA0wqDUlmiMz_lg1OwnG1mrSfUR3Tgxni_7m98RdL2A_QUSjM8tlMkN3cGzZZwqz4mNiA_HvsB3faiLaofpMeXA_jh-uqpToYKhIxD2VPQDT4MROjulR3njceENGqQ0mCSWJER9gb0l43MVqlFXd51baiqR87hFf5L0-ZhZAfWqsBONSz2eocWx-CRZbkZ7lNY_uXbQymCrlp0eHqh65927NfoLhUgsUfoaeFnVXnnFhWP_Vg51y7YwpAkf6GyGta_sTgXhZzdNQq3W25eClQpW-78STX0QCcgsniixLIzLn41oh4mCed9SLBGzFDiqarigsiJZa7HrdNW7Dqyazw%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

**I'm Blake Masters. I’m a political outsider and I have just launched my campaign for U.S. Senate against Democrat Mark Kelly.**

I grew up in Tucson, Arizona, met my wife Catherine in middle school, and now we are raising our three sons in Tucson, not far from where we grew up.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=44bea6441ec84377a5aa73fbd1f8aa7c&_e=OYdIRjUJ5sujwknLjgY1v9nu1Vn-fiJMKLafizlNULqAJ9yg7RwTZqOaYtjdKkULMAyVL8lAY1RhSSBjT3xTsJebrPtvQujSfFRlK_gOelwGEm0bnTgeRxZWOmKa0WWr9tA0wqDUlmiMz_lg1OwnG1mrSfUR3Tgxni_7m98RdL2A_QUSjM8tlMkN3cGzZZwqz4mNiA_HvsB3faiLaofpMeXA_jh-uqpToYKhIxD2VPQDT4MROjulR3njceENGqQ0rOLzJa4whOa09ZrcVyok5lPVXkhjfGNwjPvfCXDfXO4YdsCDCXYyiLhtaSLZSI78e76zZePVkk1WM93P3wmiR1x4uFn2hRfQEuJnsz0PjlyJE5IEHVLtxfdTCydQ1IX7WGvsMvJBUSfSie4xOYN1h22he26IDkO4dNOVxrl4TRlbgzQdbVbT94xE9E30o-qqFygs2A0TZ9nnxx1yOhRkkA%3D%3D)
I started my campaign with a simple thought; **you should be able to raise a family in America on a single income. The America I grew up in was optimistic, but today, for the first time, this generation expects to be worse off than our parents. **

Peter, I want to change this.

I will be a new voice in Washington – a disruptive voice for change, but I need to know you’re with me today. [**Will you join my campaign for Senate?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=44bea6441ec84377a5aa73fbd1f8aa7c&_e=OYdIRjUJ5sujwknLjgY1v9nu1Vn-fiJMKLafizlNULqAJ9yg7RwTZqOaYtjdKkULMAyVL8lAY1RhSSBjT3xTsJebrPtvQujSfFRlK_gOelwGEm0bnTgeRxZWOmKa0WWr9tA0wqDUlmiMz_lg1OwnG1mrSfUR3Tgxni_7m98RdL2A_QUSjM8tlMkN3cGzZZwqz4mNiA_HvsB3faiLaofpMeXA_jh-uqpToYKhIxD2VPQDT4MROjulR3njceENGqQ0sie_lrhM-ox_q9xRxwFm5UPFzHsgPmaihEConQ25T-p4puTCM8A0qqO2bqsGvVrkNThEI6W25u6NGErsErdwi3KpaA59D909Rizf79J2cg5TZDCZ0tjsDVZZZi7X-75v8EV10-LSX_TjPdWUjdGmwjqTtvUYC7x9i2mTICtAYAaLtwCvxmquvKKljuy40f8rorhQFVXsgqIhRf8o_uL9qw%3D%3D)

Our leaders have taken America for granted and put us in a position that makes it hard for us to succeed. It used to be that if you got an education and worked hard, you could buy a house and raise a family.

**Today, our jobs are being shipped off to China, schools are doing more indoctrinating than teaching, and our government allows an influx of illegal workers across the border to undermine the American workforce.**

Mark Kelly went to Washington D.C. with a promise to put Arizona first, he advertised himself as an independent leader. **Mark Kelly repeatedly told voters he would vote to secure our border but has instead taken every opportunity to do just the opposite.**

This is so typical. What’s remarkable is it only took Mark Kelly a few weeks to betray Arizonans and become nothing more than a rubber stamp for Chuck Schumer and his left-wing agenda.

Higher taxes, out-of-control spending and burdensome regulations designed by radical, progressive groups do irreparable harm to working families yearning to build a future.

It's time to put this country first. We need to enforce the law, finish building the wall and close the border, put small businesses before huge multinational corporations, and most importantly, get government out of the way of hard-working people who simply want to build their American dream.

This country used to work, and now it doesn't. Only an outsider can fix it. [**Can you help me make it to the Senate?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=44bea6441ec84377a5aa73fbd1f8aa7c&_e=OYdIRjUJ5sujwknLjgY1v9nu1Vn-fiJMKLafizlNULqAJ9yg7RwTZqOaYtjdKkULMAyVL8lAY1RhSSBjT3xTsJebrPtvQujSfFRlK_gOelwGEm0bnTgeRxZWOmKa0WWr9tA0wqDUlmiMz_lg1OwnG1mrSfUR3Tgxni_7m98RdL2A_QUSjM8tlMkN3cGzZZwqz4mNiA_HvsB3faiLaofpMeXA_jh-uqpToYKhIxD2VPQDT4MROjulR3njceENGqQ0cPnpPrYmezDKfWzlHMPAiUrpvUMeM2oi9dUqSOuAz0rzyWt16dXMS0OXbCcRNeXVmLb4AnWPJUn3_3BtompM5T2CGlBNkeTsO8jQim-6g6AOG_XZTjr1gdIjFWLoaSMXEJh_Z6RH-5IKBS0O16QFRYMU1u0EAS5QmYfhJGN8WNjBU3d1KXRZ8u6r2LZMEAfagn77H0WXPwbSjwrxRNqkYA%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

**P.S. I am ready to be a disruptive force for change in Washington, but I need your help.** Winning a campaign against an entrenched Democrat with millions in the bank is going to take the support of folks like you. [**If you are ready for a political outsider, will you chip in $10 or more today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=44bea6441ec84377a5aa73fbd1f8aa7c&_e=OYdIRjUJ5sujwknLjgY1v9nu1Vn-fiJMKLafizlNULqAJ9yg7RwTZqOaYtjdKkULMAyVL8lAY1RhSSBjT3xTsJebrPtvQujSfFRlK_gOelwGEm0bnTgeRxZWOmKa0WWr9tA0wqDUlmiMz_lg1OwnG1mrSfUR3Tgxni_7m98RdL2A_QUSjM8tlMkN3cGzZZwqz4mNiA_HvsB3faiLaofpMeXA_jh-uqpToYKhIxD2VPQDT4MROjulR3njceENGqQ0h1gkR2_1ld2KMlppj90EW6A6_pRG8ImnQ0EsddpZDMZ1d7nsPxoPcxP5bX4S81yAVRTiIn2zNTB4EZUkbohU5OBklvqXBKGeBy-1JJiMZ90DU0YrgCFtoGqNCAfQpeC6o1LEtDKAbagZRa9cfotrvpqIJb1TfJmMRdhoSp3nKjTYl3FxOlZXQgBhTeGO_VG2DgzCKPCPjgFAlRYFcRuMbA%3D%3D)

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=44bea6441ec84377a5aa73fbd1f8aa7c&_e=OYdIRjUJ5sujwknLjgY1v9nu1Vn-fiJMKLafizlNULqAJ9yg7RwTZqOaYtjdKkULMAyVL8lAY1RhSSBjT3xTsJebrPtvQujSfFRlK_gOelwGEm0bnTgeRxZWOmKa0WWr9tA0wqDUlmiMz_lg1OwnG1mrSfUR3Tgxni_7m98RdL2A_QUSjM8tlMkN3cGzZZwqz4mNiA_HvsB3faiLaofpMeXA_jh-uqpToYKhIxD2VPQDT4MROjulR3njceENGqQ0MEm5mK8Wpy4FJXFufl1V8bfYYaXddibG3lw_0SL5XNiTf_2-exQaYjfXC8M7yyUDFzwXHN4pMTKJoH9M4svc4XsBFt14dohYDb0cT92Q44t1ljHyzssarRbgNeqRcg_y7jg24OY6Cj6tF6jk0Phlk1qrorvaY5SXqDr5WmcNqoep7cxUG2x2Dc5qkYbB-4ahezAGgfMmmUYLpKma-jn3HA%3D%3D)

| | **Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
---

_Don't want to receive any more of our emails?
We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=44bea6441ec84377a5aa73fbd1f8aa7c&_t=lCkqXPSb25RWMwl-oK1-yDO6-WkUwghFRwUMg2FYbr7sby8USSmVkakeZrooPwFHGmMPOtJL4811AjR7KQnhfeTogpu4EfhoIMOGRKlchaVrlf8zzdgnBJeTfI-htpTjPyPwxdVNAsLMEH3bXvpjlvQ68whXHa2wYQxsoEGKEgw%3D)._

name: John Castorani
subject: I've interrogated Taliban soldiers. This is a nightmare scenario
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
I spent 19 months inside Afghanistan, so when I tell you that there was a right way to withdraw from this war, and that there was a wrong way to withd Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d3a29cf6b58640229710c9baa76a2b86&_e=-RTpLuhYQDrRYRulScpAOCv6e_86UViqX_HSL7fV-BPYOxb1FWzRHyIE1qGXk_YCUGpEFDSnPNzY7FzwerqUTm8X0-7HGezbaJf-dFS6NvKsG54UyY1YtGwv2piEVclUDY_4pcVs-2qz2xjXNyq0MdNW9wbBUH4OlZDwhe814fjVXdysbDQVVu_dcJyaKPuT1dXKmReMwC_vbbxOUj3x7KVyVc37_QqyHELF81LTvyniH5BQfbFaW-hX9sahCvSJR1VusxguevjUNTjGgh5091_ay-gxmDYyG1Lf-RI5AXn-xYLwFCr0vhW2r4GfhhHY_gnKS6NI0OeT9XxTk9UZf2GumQzf2XTdURANmE6BJsivyZ2d7BKyGknl7eZbWlDfH-DpQZsZvxSg1DBafD_ABkfYrLFnx5GpvNwMZP85YCcbsk0nYtSluRp3rV_A29044FoqNixhs4vJLXgX8kirT-vcfcKvTAjalRrFHE8de2M%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My heart is heavy this morning as I write this email to you. As a veteran of the Army and the United States intelligence community **who deployed to Afghanistan 3 times** over the course of nine years, I’m watching in horror as desperate families cling to U.S. military aircraft in hopes of finding safe haven from the Taliban.

**I spent 19 months inside Afghanistan, so when I tell you that there was a right way to withdraw from this war, and that there was a wrong way to withdrawal, I mean it**. President Biden clearly misled the American public in July when he said that “ _**There’s going to be no circumstance where you see people being lifted off the United States embassy**_.”

But what angers me more is that I know men like me, who serve in our special forces, will bear the brunt of Biden’s decision to pull out of Afghanistan in such a reckless manner. How do I know? **Because I spent six years tracking down the Islamic terrorists who killed our Ambassador in Benghazi, Libya on September 11th, 2012 while Hillary Clinton slept.**

**This is not a withdrawal; this is an abandonment leading to a humanitarian crisis of the likes we have not seen this century**. My heart is breaking for my brothers that I lost on the battlefield, **and for the members of the special forces who are going to be responsible for cleaning up this mess in the near future**.

This crisis perfectly sums up why I’m running for Congress, and today **[I’m asking you to lend your support to my campaign](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d3a29cf6b58640229710c9baa76a2b86&_e=-RTpLuhYQDrRYRulScpAOCv6e_86UViqX_HSL7fV-BPYOxb1FWzRHyIE1qGXk_YCUGpEFDSnPNzY7FzwerqUTm8X0-7HGezbaJf-dFS6NvKsG54UyY1YtGwv2piEVclUDY_4pcVs-2qz2xjXNyq0MdNW9wbBUH4OlZDwhe814fjVXdysbDQVVu_dcJyaKPuT1dXKmReMwC_vbbxOUj3x7KVyVc37_QqyHELF81LTvyniH5BQfbFaW-hX9sahCvSJR1VusxguevjUNTjGgh509xrOkuKFgEFmt6l6Ftjv3Zk3a-fS5H4OwbxbvY4rztDSgj8h16NMTKlug4mriNDokFuGNrQ6ny7kQKyGOQWiaCfkO-ME-c7QWl81Ak5hHmCJ-1ycnXiQ8I5MkNcS0WmNGglCPF19b115BXErFJmoYHwCeWKUfYEjnUTFVXMUjR-W9x-uDCkAT9-ul8cEbdhKYtWjRD6MmRLLZVSTguSEfnY%3D)**. I don’t have to run for Congress, I’ve got a great job and a newborn son at home. But this absolute shit storm that Biden created should keep us all up at night.**I’ve interrogated Taliban terrorists at Bagram Airfield, I can tell you on good authority that Biden was well aware that something like this could happen**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d3a29cf6b58640229710c9baa76a2b86&_e=-RTpLuhYQDrRYRulScpAOCv6e_86UViqX_HSL7fV-BPYOxb1FWzRHyIE1qGXk_YCUGpEFDSnPNzY7FzwerqUTm8X0-7HGezbaJf-dFS6NvKsG54UyY1YtGwv2piEVclUDY_4pcVs-2qz2xjXNyq0MdNW9wbBUH4OlZDwhe814fjVXdysbDQVVu_dcJyaKPuT1dXKmReMwC_vbbxOUj3x7KVyVc37_QqyHELF81LTvyniH5BQfbFaW-hX9sahCvSJR1VusxguevjUNTjGgh5090VXl3OtCxtSKXBoPjDBxB9RgxRdYA79ZNldt4KbJ4i6amSkSz2ctAh4BV8HYdPGmsEf3mu5J3-pBHLt2UJLbSS-oHyqQEVu1Tr_2459V4iKS7Ftcq469PeGL9JPy1sO3idrhdLLvaCVy7MkjqXMFdy1TwbIJBZQv9Aj01JWNTys2iTdQimYCIdDZh2DF15kd0PU6ckppn-uX-dzft_W7vQ%3D)
An article in the Wall Street Journal summed up the situation rather succinctly saying, “ _**The jihadists the U.S. toppled 20 years ago for sheltering Osama bin Laden will not fly their flag over the U.S. Embassy building on the 20th anniversary of 9/11**_.”

**The Taliban’s advances come as no surprise to us veterans of the Afghanistan conflict, I personally have deployed to Afghanistan 3 times during both my time in the Army and within the Intelligence Community**. We all knew that the Afghan National Army and Uniformed Police was an ineffective fighting force propped by U.S. logistics, U.S. air support and U.S. funding. Make no mistakes folks, our feckless "**leader** " President Biden was briefed on all of these facts, he was a U.S. Senator for the first 7 years of Afghanistan, the Vice President for 8 years... yet he still went through with a hasty withdrawal without addressing the possibility of a humanitarian crisis we are currently seeing. **Mr. President, the blood is on your hands**.

Folks, Democrats have complete control over Washington. **This abject failure happened on their watch, and they seem perfectly at peace to sit in their gilded offices as desperate Afghans die attempting to cling to American military planes evacuating our personnel**.

**Democrats have abandoned the Afghan people at their hour of need**. Our credibility as a superpower is shot. And what does Nancy Pelosi do? She tweets that “ _The Taliban must know the world is watching its actions_.”

Republicans are by no means perfect, but had we had a seat at the table when these outlandish decisions were made, perhaps we could have stopped what we’re seeing unfold today. **President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have all but ensured that my children and possibly grandchildren will fight the Taliban like I have**.

**[Today I’m asking you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress, because I assure you that if I’m given the opportunity to serve, I’ll make sure Biden and Pelosi are held to account for these foolish decisions](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d3a29cf6b58640229710c9baa76a2b86&_e=-RTpLuhYQDrRYRulScpAOCv6e_86UViqX_HSL7fV-BPYOxb1FWzRHyIE1qGXk_YCUGpEFDSnPNzY7FzwerqUTm8X0-7HGezbaJf-dFS6NvKsG54UyY1YtGwv2piEVclUDY_4pcVs-2qz2xjXNyq0MdNW9wbBUH4OlZDwhe814fjVXdysbDQVVu_dcJyaKPuT1dXKmReMwC_vbbxOUj3x7KVyVc37_QqyHELF81LTvyniH5BQfbFaW-hX9sahCvSJR1VusxguevjUNTjGgh5098_0zOhaYCCjhsycifEHz2pjpwLNYmCTmkjSEYs5e3f199QECTGLZEaYeiKQ9WitZ90_my5L5n3sjtNAPK4FcN2lExQgGl1XsbXSIvYbanATEjBAM4DcMOiBhF9aXHbnvlqwAaN91OgSOYZvTI2L7yRHB4HI67xBd4pRIgdaop1ilqGF41G2dArjdP2BH768iZclZPnWlBbuagbkaSc35k4%3D)**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d3a29cf6b58640229710c9baa76a2b86&_e=-RTpLuhYQDrRYRulScpAOCv6e_86UViqX_HSL7fV-BPYOxb1FWzRHyIE1qGXk_YCUGpEFDSnPNzY7FzwerqUTm8X0-7HGezbaJf-dFS6NvKsG54UyY1YtGwv2piEVclUDY_4pcVs-2qz2xjXNyq0MdNW9wbBUH4OlZDwhe814fjVXdysbDQVVu_dcJyaKPuT1dXKmReMwC_vbbxOUj3x7KVyVc37_QqyHELF81LTvyniH5BQfbFaW-hX9sahCvSJR1VusxguevjUNTjGgh509_JO-16mGI5-kVLvI9SSdYCeJe2asiIj7KfLWUtiZa9-OQwBCn46s1I9px9Sy_cXCsjc0o64PjWYVzwo_b1IdEsFpNUur4TbGQLISe3YnG817-fgu3hF_J6tEj3q3Ss1-5rV_6uNTmX4en4h7bUrXmHTLilOG0LL-_pbgFMmFim3mDlL1AQBOAicp7zMHR-hN8lEmkePhA6qv4rLqzFiip8%3D)
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d3a29cf6b58640229710c9baa76a2b86&_e=-RTpLuhYQDrRYRulScpAOCv6e_86UViqX_HSL7fV-BPYOxb1FWzRHyIE1qGXk_YCUGpEFDSnPNzY7FzwerqUTm8X0-7HGezbaJf-dFS6NvKsG54UyY1YtGwv2piEVclUDY_4pcVs-2qz2xjXNyq0MdNW9wbBUH4OlZDwhe814fjVXdysbDQVVu_dcJyaKPuT1dXKmReMwC_vbbxOUj3x7KVyVc37_QqyHELF81LTvyniH5BQfbFaW-hX9sahCvSJR1VusxguevjUNTjGgh5096bfie0bdP3mAhnpTeWAVkiL39suoQZb3ii_8h1HCX5kQ5M00qLyuZL8JJ_zevAVqin38aBKBwn_4aJLpcp6fX2utf4iAfZKIIbZ4tC0NSfGf62htg3G9BZ4G6R3WeY7YQpQT_LxlINijopw8a1fzYmKQ795iT5r_jvu25j2qehJEmL2IxYwh_P50TBeVYuLVgP5Kyrn_X7tINlNqcvbX9M%3D)

| [**HOLD BIDEN and PELOSI accountable
Send an Afghan Vet to Congress ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d3a29cf6b58640229710c9baa76a2b86&_e=-RTpLuhYQDrRYRulScpAOCv6e_86UViqX_HSL7fV-BPYOxb1FWzRHyIE1qGXk_YCUGpEFDSnPNzY7FzwerqUTm8X0-7HGezbaJf-dFS6NvKsG54UyY1YtGwv2piEVclUDY_4pcVs-2qz2xjXNyq0MdNW9wbBUH4OlZDwhe814fjVXdysbDQVVu_dcJyaKPuT1dXKmReMwC_vbbxOUj3x7KVyVc37_QqyHELF81LTvyniH5BQfbFaW-hX9sahCvSJR1VusxguevjUNTjGgh5091fjEqOuq6WqZPnfc5z-gf2lb7CmPDAdtKFUe9he8J0yKvnGNG1BTPrOmJJzwO_POLiphOqzMKslnnFs_U3m_K7lxA6n22BOALrzpN-swV9Zc9TQuvdL4cHsfVRMFyDjJ8-wV70O-K0YiWVGi4Lb93lrvnyTXvbjmDbHyJptsM44N8M8GN0LMM-FafO_UhdCRoQ-TU5FBSV-tmFT3GcWiNE%3D)
---

**Having been to Afghanistan three times** I can assure you the people of Afghanistan want and deserve an end to the bloodshed, conflict and violence. The people of Afghanistan want and deserve peace and security, access to education, employment and the political process. **We have fought so hard together for the last two decades, our coalition and the Afghan people - we should not allow those hard-fought freedoms to be taken away by the Taliban**.

While we watch in horror from the safety of the United States, the Chinese Communist leadership in Beijing are toasting to our failure.

For America
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia

name: Princess Blanding for Governor
subject: Help Support the Fight! No Corporate Money, Just People Power
body:
Hey there, Friends and Supporters! As many of you know, we’re facing a real David vs. Goliath situation. The two-party system didn't w
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/87NjBvuS5/c?w=RzW64A1rAzJAx-B9-yuxsk9r1oK7zjB6LpNYvwFAhzw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJpbmNlc3NibGFuZGluZy5jb20vc28vODdOakJ2dVM1P2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiOWE1MWU4YTctNmRjMy00OTczLTliODctMGMwYjhmYWE2NTZiIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Help Support the Fight!No Corporate Money,Just People Power
---
| | Hey there, Friends and Supporters! As many of you know, we’re facing a real David vs. Goliath situation. The two-party system didn't want me on the ballot and they are making sure I am shut out from upcoming debates, from the news cycle, you name it. Disenfranchisement is nothing new, it’s how the political machine keeps purring. Know this: We might be shut out, but we aren’t shutting down. We're doubling down and will not stop connecting to real, everyday Virginians who know we can and must do better. The truth is, our campaign will always be out-earned by millions of special interest dollars driving the well-oiled Democrat and Republican machines. I’ve pledged to never take corporate money, which means we run on people power. You’ll see the other candidates use the term “grassroots,” to describe their fundraising efforts, but a multi-million dollar campaign has nothing to do with collective action and everything to do with power and privilege:
* As of June 30, Terry McAuliffe had raised just over $20 million and Glenn Youngkin was at $19 million--$7 million of which is his own money. (Source: [VPAP ](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/87NjBvuS5/c?w=BiIeZ5oQDa4GysAkC1gS3ELkcn74ruyfcAwB87tH-Do.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudnBhcC5vcmcvb2ZmaWNlcy9nb3Zlcm5vci9lbGVjdGlvbnMvP3llYXJfYW5kX3R5cGU9MjAyMXJlZ3VsYXIiLCJyIjoiZTBmYmFiM2ItMDgyMC00ZDE2LTg1NmMtMWEwZWQxYjc4Y2ZhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiOWE1MWU4YTctNmRjMy00OTczLTliODctMGMwYjhmYWE2NTZiIn0)[2021 Election Overview](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/87NjBvuS5/c?w=BiIeZ5oQDa4GysAkC1gS3ELkcn74ruyfcAwB87tH-Do.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudnBhcC5vcmcvb2ZmaWNlcy9nb3Zlcm5vci9lbGVjdGlvbnMvP3llYXJfYW5kX3R5cGU9MjAyMXJlZ3VsYXIiLCJyIjoiZTBmYmFiM2ItMDgyMC00ZDE2LTg1NmMtMWEwZWQxYjc4Y2ZhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiOWE1MWU4YTctNmRjMy00OTczLTliODctMGMwYjhmYWE2NTZiIn0))

* As of August, Virginia gubernatorial candidates have spent more than $28 million combined so far on this year’s election. (Source: [Ballotopedia News](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/87NjBvuS5/c?w=wY5L-3N42o_0FTYKMScwFH1MaphuWGC3h40wfVAW-TA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZXdzLmJhbGxvdHBlZGlhLm9yZy8yMDIxLzA4LzA2L3RoZS1jYW1wYWlnbi1pbi12aXJnaW5pYXMtZ292ZXJub3JzLXJhY2UvIiwiciI6ImUwZmJhYjNiLTA4MjAtNGQxNi04NTZjLTFhMGVkMWI3OGNmYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjlhNTFlOGE3LTZkYzMtNDk3My05Yjg3LTBjMGI4ZmFhNjU2YiJ9))

Let that sink in for a minute. Money is driving this race, but pay-to-play politics is a fundraising game that doesn’t translate to Virginians who are struggling with unemployment, evictions, and rising healthcare costs. I've earned the right to be on your ballot and now I need your help to make my candidacy a reality.
---
| | | [**Donate Today!**](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/87NjBvuS5/c?w=dAZjV6Xf67Ctwb5Lev5Aafw-JttQe5-VPk5cuchLGRk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJpbmNlc3NibGFuZGluZy5jb20vIiwiciI6IjA4OTBjMmM2LTJkMmEtNGZjYS05YmYwLTEzOTFjOTFhNjE1YyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjlhNTFlOGE3LTZkYzMtNDk3My05Yjg3LTBjMGI4ZmFhNjU2YiJ9)
---
| | Know that when our campaign asks for donations, the money goes directly to spreading the word--buying signs and billboards, building a small ad campaign, paying our staff. We aren’t wining and dining friends, or spending absurd amounts on travel, consultants, polls and attack ads. I just want to do what I did to get on the ballot which is get out to meet you, the people, and to let you know there is a better option for the next Governor of Virginia, someone who believes in enacting real policies and change for real people. Thank you for your support,Princess Liberation is a human right, not a privilege
---
|
---

clean_body: Hey there, Friends and Supporters! As many of you know, we’re facing a real David vs. Goliath situation. The two-party system didn't w | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Help Support the Fight!No Corporate Money,Just People Power | | Hey there, Friends and Supporters! As many of you know, we’re facing a real David vs. Goliath situation. The two-party system didn't want me on the ballot and they are making sure I am shut out from upcoming debates, from the news cycle, you name it. Disenfranchisement is nothing new, it’s how the political machine keeps purring. Know this: We might be shut out, but we aren’t shutting down. We're doubling down and will not stop connecting to real, everyday Virginians who know we can and must do better. The truth is, our campaign will always be out-earned by millions of special interest dollars driving the well-oiled Democrat and Republican machines. I’ve pledged to never take corporate money, which means we run on people power. You’ll see the other candidates use the term “grassroots,” to describe their fundraising efforts, but a multi-million dollar campaign has nothing to do with collective action and everything to do with power and privilege: As of June 30, Terry McAuliffe had raised just over $20 million and Glenn Youngkin was at $19 million--$7 million of which is his own money. (Source: ) As of August, Virginia gubernatorial candidates have spent more than $28 million combined so far on this year’s election. (Source: ) Let that sink in for a minute. Money is driving this race, but pay-to-play politics is a fundraising game that doesn’t translate to Virginians who are struggling with unemployment, evictions, and rising healthcare costs. I've earned the right to be on your ballot and now I need your help to make my candidacy a reality. | | | | | Know that when our campaign asks for donations, the money goes directly to spreading the word--buying signs and billboards, building a small ad campaign, paying our staff. We aren’t wining and dining friends, or spending absurd amounts on travel, consultants, polls and attack ads. I just want to do what I did to get on the ballot which is get out to meet you, the people, and to let you know there is a better option for the next Governor of Virginia, someone who believes in enacting real policies and change for real people. Thank you for your support,Princess Liberation is a human right, not a privilege | | | | | | | | Any and all donations are appreciated. If that’s not possible, we’d love to get you a sign to promote our campaign! | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: MS GOP
subject: Biden’s Failed leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party
body:
This is failed leadership from Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. | |
---
Fellow Republican,
By now, you have seen the mess in Afghanistan. This is not a failure on the part of the American Military. _**This is failed leadership from Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.**_

Former Secretary of Defense, Robert Gates, was right when he said: “I think he [Joe Bide] has been wrong on nearly every major foreign policy and national security issue over the past four decades.”

We cannot stand for poor leadership anymore! Please, join us today if you want better leadership for our nation!
[_**DONATE**_](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=1a0935abef1b490c9e6b880c8d79b6d3&_e=cXdCawBQ7rXhGSksvtQ_c1jrjowrT3JKNIvutY9WM4BKheVNBXyUDe3bmMhdINdH-NM9hgjX8xLGQmLc18SUlPp6kafyBkTepe2SrixikIhNIydp0S7haZdKciGhwrvzAxCoyj48LFGHKB8BORdnlEkHLzmXRJf773RfONQNbhk0cyhSUCv7f44iXnWHqZ-hZTtQ-1gncLprcUkVrxO8WpOa91WiWSUfVVvKvFouI4ClAYR8qZTgrvth1BEBqZwWOq3Z93vqKuEeR1fgKs2yQ6eKYqAZH7vgBtpGm8pK5r56WQaJwVsZlFABJVuuwL2Pr7M656yvABTSR5CmmFR8ajCqUq1qs6E9tV2YyggJ_aAho4Mbne80tc6T89KfHOWfmS-Apb89nXfD61J2_wG12jnPihXwNEoDHMKufNkwggA%3D)
Biden said it was “highly unlikely” that the Taliban would overrun Afghanistan.

He was wrong.

Biden said there would be “no circumstance where you see people being lifted off the roof of the embassy in the – of the United States from Afghanistan.”

Yesterday, Americans witnessed stunning images of Americans being evacuated by helicopter from our embassy in Kabul.

Joe Biden has failed as America’s Commander-in-Chief. With the Taliban in control of Afghanistan, America and our allies are now less safe because of Biden. Our soldiers, marines, sailors, and airmen who sacrificed so much deserve better.

_**Join us today to tell Joe Biden that America deserves better!**_
[_**DONATE!**_](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=1a0935abef1b490c9e6b880c8d79b6d3&_e=cXdCawBQ7rXhGSksvtQ_c1jrjowrT3JKNIvutY9WM4BKheVNBXyUDe3bmMhdINdH-NM9hgjX8xLGQmLc18SUlPp6kafyBkTepe2SrixikIhNIydp0S7haZdKciGhwrvzAxCoyj48LFGHKB8BORdnlEkHLzmXRJf773RfONQNbhk0cyhSUCv7f44iXnWHqZ-hZTtQ-1gncLprcUkVrxO8WkDLY8E7lhxvSFKHdWgIVWGz99QAiVNG1S6zSejsICNsD6adPUzhllDMrLgDoHWmRzWgoE7VhC1pFWvZbWegXQatiJZiHngWWbzmrVX33J3vemjcrZhQ_wOY3PFWhxbVgNUR7p263FLiPehI9pqKNwSdf5n4Za1Aa1bJTIErJ7sQGVoIbGzH0KFLcRDM015QIUCPlZumEBTmonudOWkRmOQ%3D)
Sincerely,

Mississippi GOP
|
