name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: $902 away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
As of right now, we’re still $902 short of hitting our $15,000 mid-month goal — but we can raise that in no time if one out of every four people reading this email chip in before midnight.
#
Peter, you're amazing.
Since we reached out yesterday with news of the summer fundraising slowdown we’re experiencing, this grassroots team stepped up in a BIG way to help us reach an important $15,000 mid-month goal.
**As of right now, we’re still $902 short — but we can raise that in no time if one out of every four people reading this email chips in before midnight.**
[**Be one of the donors we need to help us hit this goal with a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford today so we can support Pramila’s bold and fearless advocacy for our progressive priorities in Congress:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210816?refcode=em20210816-548&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=548_420207_8iWAzQ&akid=548%2E420207%2E8iWAzQ)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210816?refcode=em20210816-548&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=548_420207_8iWAzQ&akid=548%2E420207%2E8iWAzQ)**
Thanks so much,
Team Jayapal
P.S. If you missed our email from yesterday, we shared it below to explain why hitting this goal is so important:
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Pramila Jayapal HQ <info@e.pramilaforcongress.com
Date: Sun, Aug 15, 2021
Subject: Not loving this trend
Peter, we’re not loving this trend:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210816?refcode=em20210816-548&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=548_420207_8iWAzQ&akid=548%2E420207%2E8iWAzQ)
That graphic might not mean much to you, so let us explain: We're almost halfway through August, and we’re lagging behind what we raised at this time last month. **But, if we can raise $15,00 by midnight tomorrow, we'll be back on track in no time.**
[**Grassroots donors like you make Pramila’s bold advocacy for progressive priorities — and our movement to support her — possible. Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can afford, toward our mid-month goal today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210816?refcode=em20210816-548&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=42&refcode2=548_420207_8iWAzQ&akid=548%2E420207%2E8iWAzQ)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210816?refcode=em20210816-548&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=43&refcode2=548_420207_8iWAzQ&akid=548%2E420207%2E8iWAzQ)**
We’re officially in the dog days of summer, which means people spend less time in front of screens reading emails like this one and more time with loved ones.
That’s great, but it _also_ means our primary source of the revenue that fuels our organizing is drying up at a critical moment in the fight for child care, paid leave, education, Medicare expansion, a roadmap to citizenship, affordable housing, climate action, lower prescription drug prices, and so much more.
[**So if you can afford it at this time, chip in $3 or more toward our mid-month goal of $15,000 to power our people-powered movement forward. It’s going to be a busy fall, and we can’t afford to fall short.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210816?refcode=em20210816-548&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=44&refcode2=548_420207_8iWAzQ&akid=548%2E420207%2E8iWAzQ)
Thank you for your support,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210816-548-footer&t=45&refcode2=548_420207_8iWAzQ&akid=548%2E420207%2E8iWAzQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Ron DeSantis and Glenn Youngkin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34170745/301130829/-2023814932?refcode=20210816.4_TM_8BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjEzY2RjMy1lNWZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RTtNvzfq9OpJ2VRR2y-FfKoOjS5VRYt_2TinSkhUHRA=)

| | Derek,

Right now, job number one for any Governor is keeping constituents safe from COVID. That’s what makes Florida Governor Ron DeSantis so alarming. Instead of listening to public health experts and following the science, DeSantis is playing politics with the pandemic just like his hero Donald Trump.

Now, a tragedy is unfolding in Florida.

_**Folks, DeSantis' dangerous pandemic response is exactly what Glenn Youngkin wants to bring to Virginia.**_

Youngkin has said he wants to model his governorship after DeSantis. He opposed critical funding for vaccine distribution. And he's cozied up to both Donald Trump and anti-vaccine extremist Amanda Chase.

Here's the hard truth:

_**Glenn Youngkin is more concerned with pleasing Donald Trump and his extreme right-wing base than he is about doing what's best for Virginians.**_

[**HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=8c8007f9fe5a4466a75dc07a608ff40c&_e=KMhXXOJ-PdHnm1aDIm685XCNp_gRMktlk04Rt7bywWOXfqHyQd2tzlJeRV5NeXRzvFbeVxKE0l3RUK3mBFJvMAQFsdgSmtk-fu0Lk9ugeJsQ1d9b6uQfm-6JXQFsHOsRKgS8601JTCo2zREMr9ZbUO30luU7qmPYYCLJnDrgbmHbh_KmqkEAVecK2nyIxlWIM8yOsyujv--9Sg_w_SlaMd32_cTpspUOI8k0Fz5UIyW8JNFnxpmZCkjXTLMH_lpC6xFYTWdF7xsSbCSR8Hne8eZ0JVvqPijCk-Dwu2ZN3eQ1QRRJF-SDFoL3qEQwF_9klJYfYT4RY75Yt93Z8QP8BzSJ9Ye1WaiZaZ5ghUuiockfz7N8r_qhOQnWikhagdvYDAk2lbmhGfsdXMkcLuBr4azBQQFh3JBd1NIfkrSZirJIj4H2OxV_U8zPaWX23npKRbuX5X6d29tP5dDuUfT_Cstc6zG00_afHEaqPYYyXBE1-tc0-63hc3VcciQVv3ZyPACDukXcAcmKXEiCL6EmoQ%3D%3D)
**Peter, what’s even more concerning is that there has been radio silence from the** _**President of the United States**_**, the** _**Vice President**_**, and the** _**Press Secretary**_**. **

**This is a dereliction of their duties and oath of office.**

This administration has not only made our country weaker internally but also exposed us to our enemies abroad.

Joe Biden was recently in front of a camera saying that this exact scenario would never happen, and now he’s hiding from the American people.

He either dimwittedly or intentionally armed our enemies with our own helicopters, firearms, vehicles, and drones and allowed them to strike up a relationship with China.

The people he abandoned in Afghanistan deserve better, our military members and veterans deserve better, and the American people deserve better.

**Peter, we, the American people, deserve answers from our leadersー** _[**sign your name to Hold Biden Accountable >>**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=8c8007f9fe5a4466a75dc07a608ff40c&_e=KMhXXOJ-PdHnm1aDIm685XCNp_gRMktlk04Rt7bywWOXfqHyQd2tzlJeRV5NeXRzvFbeVxKE0l3RUK3mBFJvMAQFsdgSmtk-fu0Lk9ugeJsQ1d9b6uQfm-6JXQFsHOsRKgS8601JTCo2zREMr9ZbUO30luU7qmPYYCLJnDrgbmHbh_KmqkEAVecK2nyIxlWIM8yOsyujv--9Sg_w_SlaMd32_cTpspUOI8k0Fz5UIyW8JNFnxpmZCkjXTLMH_lpC6xFYTWdF7xsSbCSR8Hne8eZ0JVvqPijCk-Dwu2ZN3eQmsEJJNdQnVunTyxB1k2i30dyp5sCqhTvuZVunBkvUyY0278GMn6vlXdPNrH6m_S8HDxSjhIMNTj8Dnd9QokAqMsnHeIfefHubjo5mDhhGAOeC2IQ_418AfPbQ5lZVYjkNzUWZJuJI-_Sy3WPGKIuavv2GYhsLyBT5GEpHuEZe6otHyibb-FHVwaq-5WzDPZQDv0yzGejgCTrU-_X2T_f-pCEqiBTre_WAuANNtyl_Vg%3D%3D)_

clean_body: The footage I’m seeing coming out of Afghanistan is... | | Peter, the footage I’m seeing coming out of Afghanistan is deeply concerning. Here’s my statement on the situation: Peter, what’s even more concerning is that there has been radio silence from the President of the United States, the Vice President, and the Press Secretary. This is a dereliction of their duties and oath of office. This administration has not only made our country weaker internally but also exposed us to our enemies abroad. Joe Biden was recently in front of a camera saying that this exact scenario would never happen, and now he’s hiding from the American people. He either dimwittedly or intentionally armed our enemies with our own helicopters, firearms, vehicles, and drones and allowed them to strike up a relationship with China. The people he abandoned in Afghanistan deserve better, our military members and veterans deserve better, and the American people deserve better. Peter, we, the American people, deserve answers from our leadersー Thank you, Andrew Garbarino | | | PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS | | P.O. Box 101, Bayport, NY 11705 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

When I announced this campaign, I made a promise that I would always be fully transparent with voters and supporters.

So here's the truth:

**Central Valley voters _know_ that McCarthy has been horrible, but our biggest obstacle is that many don't know I'm the viable Democrat running against him. **

We're spreading the word about the alternative we're offering -- and we're doing it early. The best way we can keep that up is by making sure we have resources to run a strong voter communication effort -- that's where you come in:

**We are coming up $12,131 short of where we need to be to stay on track for our weekly fundraising goal. If everyone reading this email chipped in just $10 right now, we'd meet our goal TODAY. I know we can do this, but it'll only happen if we all step up and do it as a team:**

**[Can you chip in $3 before 11:59 PM tonight to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34172327/301134300/-686739743?refcode=em-08162021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTEzMWE5Mi1lY2ZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8mTbU2FOb9vCnUC9ieBCmqmG4fMe3gBPxVcJXC9AZY=)**

McCarthy repulses voters here in CA-23: He started the year groveling to Trump and the furthest-right wing of his party. Already this month, he said horrible things about women and disrespected Capitol Police. Enough is enough.

But to win this race, we have to talk about what WE are offering. We have to talk about real issues that matter to the Central Valley and their solutions. That's exactly what we're doing, and it’s why we need your help.

**[Chip in $3 to help us reach more undecided voters>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34172328/301134301/-686739743?refcode=em-08162021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTEzMWE5Mi1lY2ZlLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8mTbU2FOb9vCnUC9ieBCmqmG4fMe3gBPxVcJXC9AZY=)**

Yours,

Marisa
Teacher for Congress

name: Erica Smith
subject: A hymn of grace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
know times are hard right now.
#
**Times are hard right now.**
Just this past week, a UN report revealed that we are running out of time to avoid irreversible damage to our climate.
A 7.2 magnitude earthquake devastated Haiti.
The Taliban have seized control of Afghanistan, putting women, children, and our allies in danger.
The spread of COVID here at home is pushing hospitals to full capacity, threatening our lives and livelihoods once again.
Our planet is suffering and so are its people.
**I don’t have all the answers. There is so much that we don’t know. But there’s also a lot that we _do_ know.**
We know that endless wars are not the answer.
We know that more oil is not the answer.
We know that the vaccine is safe, affordable, and effective.
We know that we need a new foreign policy that prioritizes diplomacy over war and human rights over political convenience.
The question that’s being asked to us is whether or not we will allow for a complete collapse or rise to meet this moment. With our own hands, can we forge a future of equity and prosperity for all of God’s children, from Kabul to Port-au Prince to Durham?
**I’m holding close the women and children of Afghanistan, the people of Haiti, and the veterans who answered our nation’s call to go to war close in my heart and in my prayers.**
It’s easy to feel powerless while watching the news and scrolling through social media — even as a candidate for U.S. Senate. But we can’t let that happen. We can’t loosen our grip on the moral arc of the universe.
For the folks who need us, for the people we love, for the places we call home, we need to pull harder, we need to love more, and we need to fight until our shared song of sorrow becomes a hymn of grace.
_Amazing Grace, how sweet the sound,_
_That saved a wretch like me_
_I once was lost but now I am found_
_Was blind, but now I see_
With love and solidarity,
Erica

clean_body: know times are hard right now. Times are hard right now. Just this past week, a UN report revealed that we are running out of time to avoid irreversible damage to our climate. A 7.2 magnitude earthquake devastated Haiti. The Taliban have seized control of Afghanistan, putting women, children, and our allies in danger. The spread of COVID here at home is pushing hospitals to full capacity, threatening our lives and livelihoods once again. Our planet is suffering and so are its people. I don’t have all the answers. There is so much that we don’t know. But there’s also a lot that we do know. We know that endless wars are not the answer. We know that more oil is not the answer. We know that the vaccine is safe, affordable, and effective. We know that we need a new foreign policy that prioritizes diplomacy over war and human rights over political convenience. The question that’s being asked to us is whether or not we will allow for a complete collapse or rise to meet this moment. With our own hands, can we forge a future of equity and prosperity for all of God’s children, from Kabul to Port-au Prince to Durham? I’m holding close the women and children of Afghanistan, the people of Haiti, and the veterans who answered our nation’s call to go to war close in my heart and in my prayers. It’s easy to feel powerless while watching the news and scrolling through social media — even as a candidate for U.S. Senate. But we can’t let that happen. We can’t loosen our grip on the moral arc of the universe. For the folks who need us, for the people we love, for the places we call home, we need to pull harder, we need to love more, and we need to fight until our shared song of sorrow becomes a hymn of grace. Amazing Grace, how sweet the sound, That saved a wretch like me I once was lost but now I am found Was blind, but now I see With love and solidarity, Erica Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

Peter, Joe Biden just stood in front of the nation and blamed everyone else for his failures in Afghanistan. He absolutely refused to take responsibility for his own failure. It was one of the most disgraceful public statements by a president in modern American history. Joe Biden is an absolute embarrassment to our nation, and his weakness is a threat to our national security. | STOP JOE BIDEN EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #040945 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $35 or more | | | | | | | Two more years of Joe Biden at the helm without a Republican check in Congress could absolutely destroy our nation, Peter. He’s broadcasting his weakness to the world and putting everything we’ve achieved at risk. We can win big in the Midterm Elections, Peter, so long as we have you by our side. | Thank you. Fellow Conservative, As an Afghanistan combat veteran and a member of the House Armed Services committee, I am truly disgusted with what Joe Biden has allowed to happen. Thousands of American soldiers like myself, fought in Afghanistan to defend our nation and secure freedom for the men, women and children of that country. Joe Biden has undone **ALL of that**. Instead of listening to the intelligence, the Biden administration ordered a hasty, unplanned evacuation that would only lead to the Taliban taking back over. The terrible images we have seen from Afghanistan are something that will never be forgotten. **_This would not have happened under President Trump’s watch._**

Our only hope of ending this crisis before it spirals further out of control is to FLIP the House -- but that all starts by winning this NEW seat right here in Texas. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Sent: Wed, Aug 11, 2021 Subject: A true crisis - To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have single-handedly created a crisis at our southern border. And what is their answer? To SUE the great state of Texas for daring to defend itself and our nation's borders. But the betrayal of Americans by this administration doesn’t stop there... The Democrats will happily threaten YOU with another lockdown, all the while REFUSING to lockdown our border. Our only chance of reversing Biden and Kamala’s utter failure at the southern border is to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE -- and that all starts by winning this NEW seat right here in Texas. It’s telling that the Left is more inclined to strip away the freedoms of American citizens with lockdowns and mask mandates than they are to secure our border from illegal immigrants. Their hypocrisy truly knows no bounds. Democrats don’t think you can be trusted to make your own decisions about your health, but they demand you trust them when they tell you this is not a crisis: Roughly 1,000 immigrants packed under the Anzalduas Bridge in Mission, Texas because our border patrol agents are simply that overwhelmed. This MUST stop, Friend. I didn’t risk my life to protect our freedoms in the Army to come home and watch as our borders crumble under failed leadership while American citizens were put LAST. That’s why I’m counting on grassroots patriots like you to help me win this race and ensure we flip the House next year. We can’t wait until 2024 to end this crisis. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. body:
Our stance on Afghanistan. | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=edb4bb10c2&e=ae0ea222da)

|
## FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:
TINA RAMIREZ FOR CONGRESS STANCE ON AFGHANISTAN

Friend,

Regardless of where you stand on America’s involvement in Afghanistan over the past two decades. It has been made apparent that Joe Biden’s expedited and careless withdrawal has created an entirely preventable foreign policy disaster.

Joe Biden addressed the American People and stated that the Taliban would not regain control of the Country. Now we see that the Taliban was able to take control in a matter of days.

Senior Military leadership made it abundantly clear that this exact scenario would unfold. Joe Biden either lied directly to you or is astoundingly ignorant.

But now, as we watch Afghanistan unravel what our dedicated service members sacrificed to build and support, and as we watch a human rights disaster and a national security crisis unfolds, Biden is hiding at Camp David.

This is disrespectful to the thousands of lost lives and squandering of trillions of tax dollars.

Our Military deserves better.

Our US personnel deserve better.

Our Afghan allies deserve better.

And the women and girls of Afghanistan deserve better.

We need real leadership and experience guiding our foreign policy. There is too much at stake for us to tolerate this level of incompetence and recklessness.

-

[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=7d788e3bb2&e=ae0ea222da)
Tina Ramirez

name: Bruno Amato
subject: Hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | |
---
I wish Kevin McCarthy would spare us the hypocrisy, folks. Right now, he is exhibiting exceptional fake outrage and I almost believe him. _Almost_. Then President Donald Trump had planned to remove troops from Afghanistan on May 1st of this year — he even released a statement in April demanding the Biden administration withdraw troops earlier, saying “ _Getting out of Afghanistan is a wonderful and positive thing to do. I planned to withdraw on May 1st and we should keep as close to that schedule as possible.”_ He has nothing of substance to back up his supposed “care” for the humanitarian crisis in Afghanistan right now as the Taliban continues to advance all across the country. He has no ground to stand on when it comes to expressing his grateful wishes towards the veterans that served in deployments to Afghanistan. His fake outrage is a joke and an insult to the thousands of Afghan people who are currently living in fear of Taliban rule after a 20 year long failed experiment of an American presence in Afghanistan. We took a look at Kevin McCarthy’s record on this, folks. Here’s how he voted on critical measures as they relate to the current crisis and our foreign policy:
* He voted NO on the removal of troops from Iraq
* He voted NO on investigating Bush for lying about Iraq
* He voted NO on the withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan

When Trump released his statement on April 1st, 2021 criticizing the Biden Administration’s delay for the removal of troops and saying it should be as close to May 1st as possible, did Kevin McCarthy make any kind of statement against it? No. Was Kevin McCarthy tweeting his outrage and making headlines for his statements against Trump? My team looked. We found nothing. Was Kevin McCarthy expressing his wishes for Trump to recant on these plans while he was President? No, he wasn’t. **The last time he even tweeted about Afghanistan before this month was in February 2020 when he tweeted his support for the agreement reached to remove troops.** Kevin McCarthy only cares about foreign policy when he’s trying to score political points. He makes loud statements about the failure of an administration after abdicating responsibility and voting against measures that would have prevented this current crisis.

He has a lot to say about the plight of women's rights in Afghanistan while voting against crucial reproductive justice measures here in the United States as a member of the United States Congress.

He sends out platitudes to folks who have served in the military _while failing to get a new VA clinic in his district after ten years of broken promises._ This is not leadership, folks. This is cowardice. McCarthy is a disgrace to this country. Today, I am thinking of all the Afghani people who are watching the results of a failed military experiment by the United States play out in real time. I am thinking of all the veterans who were sent out there under the guise of protecting a country without any real plan or purpose. We must admit all seeking refuge, safely assist U.S. personnel and do everything else we can to help in this crisis.

Below, you will find links to give to Neighbors in Need: Afghan Allies, a fund to help resettle Afghan refugees in the Bay Area and across California, and a fund for Afghan women from Women For Women International. If you are able to do so, please chip in what you can. Thank you, Bruno Amato

clean_body: | | | I wish Kevin McCarthy would spare us the hypocrisy, folks. Right now, he is exhibiting exceptional fake outrage and I almost believe him. Almost. Then President Donald Trump had planned to remove troops from Afghanistan on May 1st of this year — he even released a statement in April demanding the Biden administration withdraw troops earlier, saying “ Getting out of Afghanistan is a wonderful and positive thing to do. I planned to withdraw on May 1st and we should keep as close to that schedule as possible.” He has nothing of substance to back up his supposed “care” for the humanitarian crisis in Afghanistan right now as the Taliban continues to advance all across the country. He has no ground to stand on when it comes to expressing his grateful wishes towards the veterans that served in deployments to Afghanistan. His fake outrage is a joke and an insult to the thousands of Afghan people who are currently living in fear of Taliban rule after a 20 year long failed experiment of an American presence in Afghanistan. We took a look at Kevin McCarthy’s record on this, folks. Here’s how he voted on critical measures as they relate to the current crisis and our foreign policy: He voted NO on the removal of troops from Iraq He voted NO on investigating Bush for lying about Iraq He voted NO on the withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan When Trump released his statement on April 1st, 2021 criticizing the Biden Administration’s delay for the removal of troops and saying it should be as close to May 1st as possible, did Kevin McCarthy make any kind of statement against it? No. Was Kevin McCarthy tweeting his outrage and making headlines for his statements against Trump? My team looked. We found nothing. Was Kevin McCarthy expressing his wishes for Trump to recant on these plans while he was President? No, he wasn’t. The last time he even tweeted about Afghanistan before this month was in February 2020 when he tweeted his support for the agreement reached to remove troops.** Kevin McCarthy only cares about foreign policy when he’s trying to score political points. He makes loud statements about the failure of an administration after abdicating responsibility and voting against measures that would have prevented this current crisis. He has a lot to say about the plight of women's rights in Afghanistan while voting against crucial reproductive justice measures here in the United States as a member of the United States Congress. He sends out platitudes to folks who have served in the military while failing to get a new VA clinic in his district after ten years of broken promises. This is not leadership, folks. This is cowardice. McCarthy is a disgrace to this country. Today, I am thinking of all the Afghani people who are watching the results of a failed military experiment by the United States play out in real time. I am thinking of all the veterans who were sent out there under the guise of protecting a country without any real plan or purpose. We must admit all seeking refuge, safely assist U.S. personnel and do everything else we can to help in this crisis. Below, you will find links to give to Neighbors in Need: Afghan Allies, a fund to help resettle Afghan refugees in the Bay Area and across California, and a fund for Afghan women from Women For Women International. If you are able to do so, please chip in what you can. Thank you, Bruno Amato | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress

clean_body: Volunteers needed for COVID-19 Vaccine Studies Right now local doctors are looking for high-risk healthy adults to join local research studies. Those who qualify may receive : Payment up to $1,220, varies by study. No-cost study-related care from local doctors. No-cost study vaccine. To unsubscribe please or write to: 1074 West Taylor Street #332, Chicago, IL 60607 Dear ghetoprito, Welcome to the Enterprise Plus? membership experience. Your Enterprise Plus member number and user name is HYFYF4W. Your membership delivers faster reservations and rentals, a special members-only line at major airport locations and exclusive discounts. In addition, you'll be able to start earning points you can redeem for Free Rental Days after you activate your rewards. Please allow 24 hours for system updates before activating. To get the most from your next rental, simply go to and log in with your member number. Thank you for choosing Enterprise. We look forward to making your next rental experience more rewarding. Donald J. Trump August 16th, 2021
First Joe Biden surrendered to COVID and it has come roaring back. Then he surrendered to the Taliban, who has quickly overtaken Afghanistan and destroyed confidence in American power and influence. The outcome in Afghanistan, including the withdrawal, would have been totally different if the Trump Administration had been in charge. Who or what will Joe Biden surrender to next? Someone should ask him, if they can find him.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Reversal of School Mask Mandate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom's Political Mandates](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqXp5S9QArmUN3phQ4QOoVrFVakuv44INqqUriCtJDdhw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug16&n=1) The UK is not requiring masks in schools, based on a “very strong” expert consensus that the harms to kids exceed the benefits. This will be my policy as Governor. As far as the new vaccine mandates, which no other state has, Newsom just confirmed their purpose is entirely political: he’s running anti-Recall ads attacking us for wanting to reverse them. While Newsom’s ads rely on fear-mongering, mine aim for optimism. We have a new [mail ad](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=T5He9HRd2mnp6QN0SYKMHEGgI-Mi0Nowc5mws1asme-cGpsTB9w5tuCOD6oZ19KFkprjjan4i35-4MJuvqD7dXWPE0bw5UAqtVmmdSfdOcBzp0wACAx872EPBjmbRNVa&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug16&n=2) as well as a 2-minute video ad titled “[Not a Second to Waste](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRa19xD1Akk2A1enmV0ZmEuy7OmADZyX8nJMxo7OEnKrsg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug16&n=3).” There are two debates this week. [Tomorrow’s](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=nDoifbzWUWBfkEIrkZlyFytj5AHaIOsUrbnIVCbmGT-wzFmhuQ6yjbWpRh-j94K432dskMAIImevWGbCNQRuJBKz9c08LY0y16xltdudNbDH869rOWmpGRe7yOOuR3GD7MPAHOK4p-dCOcaoU-e1EA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug16&n=4) in Sacramento will be on the radio and [Thursday’s](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=IaEX4RZAzGzT4LCxvxGVe0cWlJ815b4SMMlzviuOCsI63OIux_2S-Ud6TfRHqia2scAMIl2PYRaKmE8HG76kAqsjvLnCjtAxxpYWRfRQ5W-0JU0f159S7MWACxbX5lHG1q3EoqFbLbAuw8UwG7GTujDGw5bPixF3MW8xRPqb4xnwugshQAGtPP_0rKJ6CC-d&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug16&n=5) in San Francisco will be televised. This comes as a poll shows the Recall is a dead heat. Finally, I’ve heard the concern that having a few strong candidates might “split the vote.” Jenna Ellis, the lawyer for President Trump, [explained](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TtYZxAyKh_Fz1MCeJkktpFwx4oFxxI892mxnhBS-X4lJP4W5Ir3QgyGQ9OqMlqD2IQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug16&n=6) why that’s not an issue: “ _Having multiple strong replacement candidates is actually helpful toward the goal of ousting Newsom since different candidates will turn out different supporters who will all vote YES on Q1. Support @KevinKileyCA. He can win_.” [You can help our new ads reach more voters. Click here to donate.](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug16&n=7) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxN1WKy6penDJXBNm6ZGw45lw1FOvIJp3Z1uqFTPLk34AnbSAGqbrNsXLD_as08GI6JEWEBUfdbWMS20ozGjl0ty7j63KuedYbiDQjGJcTNwgOzHx_McIo3xeniSNfXVF0&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug16&n=8) Kevin Kiley
[KileyForCalifornia.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug16&n=9)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug16&n=10).
